.keel/epics/VFDv1i61H/voyages/VFDv3gE5m/RECURSIVE_PLANNER_PROOF.md --- Text
 1 # Recursive Planner Proof
 2 
 3 ## Implemented Backbone
 4 
 5 - Interpretation-time operator memory now includes `AGENTS.md` plus linked foundational guidance excerpts in [agent_memory.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs).
 6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
 7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
 8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
 9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).
10 
11 ## Documentation Sync
12 
13 - The recursive harness backbone, current runtime lanes, and planner/synth split were updated in [README.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/README.md).
14 - The detailed implementation snapshot was updated in [ARCHITECTURE.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/ARCHITECTURE.md).
15 - Operational invariants and operator guidance were updated in [POLICY.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/POLICY.md), [AGENTS.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/AGENTS.md), [INSTRUCTIONS.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/INSTRUCTIONS.md), and [CONFIGURATION.md](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/CONFIGURATION.md).
16 
17 ## Verification
18 
19 - `cargo test`
20 - `cargo fmt --all --check`
21 - `just quality`
22 - `cargo nextest run`

1296 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
1297 ...  571         &self,
1298 ...  572         prompt: &str,
1299 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
1300 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
1301 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
1302 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
1303 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
1304 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
1305 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
1306 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
1307 ...  581             .prepared
1308 ...  582             .gatherer
1309 ...  583             .as_ref()
1310 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
1311 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
1312 ...  586 
1313 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
1314 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
1315 ...  589                 prompt,
1316 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
1317 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
1318 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
1319 ...  593             )
1320 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
1321 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
1322 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
1323 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
1324 ...  598                 sequence,
1325 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
1326 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
1327 ...  601             });
1328 ...  602 
1329 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
1330 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
1331 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
1332 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
1333 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
1334 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
1335 ...  609                         });
1336 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
1337 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
1338 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
1339 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
1340 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
1341 ...  615                                     intent
1342 ...  616                                         .clone()
1343 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
1344 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
1345 ...  619                                 )
1346 ...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
1347 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
1348 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
1349 ...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
1350 ...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
1351 ...  625                                         &loop_state,
1352 ...  626                                     ),
1353 ...  627                                 );
1354 ...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
1355 ...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
1356 ...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
1357 ...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
1358 ...  632                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
1359 ...  633                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
1360 ...  634                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
1361 ...  635                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
1362 ...  636                                                     &self.workspace_root,
1363 ...  637                                                     bundle,
1364 ...  638                                                 ),
1365 ...  639                                             });
1366 ...  640                                             if let Some(planner) = bundle.planner.as_ref() {
1367 ...  641                                                 event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
1368 ...  642                                                     strategy: format_planner_strategy(
1369 ...  643                                                         &planner.strategy,
1370 ...  644                                                     )
1371 ...  645                                                     .to_string(),
1372 ...  646                                                     turns: planner.turn_count,
1373 ...  647                                                     steps: planner.steps.len(),
1374 ...  648                                                     stop_reason: planner.stop_reason.clone(),
1375 ...  649                                                 });
1376 ...  650                                             }
1377 ...  651                                             merge_evidence_items(
1378 ...  652                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
1379 ...  653                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
1380 ...  654                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
1381 ...  655                                             );
1382 ...  656                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
1383 ...  657                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
1384 ...  658                                             bundle.summary.clone()
1385 ...  659                                         } else {
1386 ...  660                                             "planner search returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
1387 ...  661                                         }
1388 ...  662                                     }
1389 ...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
1390 ...  664                                 }
1391 ...  665                             }
1392 ...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
1393 ...  667                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
1394 ...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
1395 ...  669                             }
1396 ...  670                         }
1397 ...  671                     } else {
1398 ...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
1399 ...  673                     }
1400 ...  674                 }
1401 ...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
1402 ...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
1403 ...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());
1404 ...  678                         "planner read budget exhausted".to_string()

1420 ...  694                 }
1421 ...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
1422 ...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
1423 ...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());
1424 ...  698                         "planner inspect budget exhausted".to_string()

1439 ...  713                     }
1440 ...  714                 }
1441 ...  715                 PlannerAction::Refine { query, .. } => {
1442 ...  716                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
1443 ...  717                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {

1483 ...  757                                         } else {
1484 ...  758                                             "planner refine returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
1485 ...  759                                         }

1490 ...  764                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }

1500 ...  774                     for branch in branches.iter().take(budget.max_branch_factor) {
1501 ...  775                         if !loop_state.pending_branches.contains(branch) {
1502 ...  776                             loop_state.pending_branches.push(branch.clone());

1521 ...  795

1526 ...  800             if stop_reason.is_some() {
1527 ...  801                 break;

1530 ...  804

1532 ...  806         let stop_reason = stop_reason.unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-budget-exhausted".to_string());

1534 ...  808             strategy: "model-driven".to_string(),

2514 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
2515 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
2516 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
2517 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
2518 ... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
2519 ... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
2520 ... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
2521 ... 191         return Ok(None);
2522 ... 192     }
2523 ... 193 
2524 ... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
2525 ... 195         path,
2526 ... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
2527 ... 197         kind,
2528 ... 198     }))
2529 ... 199 }

2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
2552 ... 269     {
2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
2554 ... 271             continue;
2555 ... 272         };
2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
2559 ... 276         }
2560 ... 277     }
2561 ... 278     ordered
2562 ... 279 }
2563 ... 280 
2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
2570 ... 287             break;
2571 ... 288         };
2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
2575 ... 292         }
2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
2577 ... 294     }
2578 ... 295     targets
2579 ... 296 }
2580 ... 297 
2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
2585 ... 302 
2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
2592 ... 309                 }
2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
2594 ... 311             }
2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
2596 ... 313             continue;
2597 ... 314         }
2598 ... 315 
2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
2601 ... 318         }
2602 ... 319     }
2603 ... 320 
2604 ... 321     targets
2605 ... 322 }
2606 ... 323 
2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
2609 ... 326 }
2610 ... 327 
2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
2615 ... 332     {
2616 ... 333         return None;
2617 ... 334     }
2618 ... 335 
2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
2621 ... 338         return None;
2622 ... 339     }
2623 ... 340 
2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
2626 ... 343     } else {
2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
2628 ... 345     };
2629 ... 346 
2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
2632 ... 349     } else {
2633 ... 350         None
2634 ... 351     }
2635 ... 352 }
2636 159 353 
2637 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
2638 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
2639 
2640 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
2641 170 364     trimmed
2642 171 365 }

2644 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
2645 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
2646 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
2647 ... 370         .display()
2648 ... 371         .to_string()
2649 ... 372 }
2650 ... 373 
2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
2654 ... 377 
2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
2661 ... 384                 .iter()
2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
2663 ... 386                 .count();
2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
2670 ... 393                     break;
2671 ... 394                 }
2672 ... 395             }
2673 ... 396         }
2674 ... 397     }
2675 ... 398 
2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
2678 ... 401             lines
2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
2682 ... 405         );
2683 ... 406     }
2684 ... 407 
2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
2686 ... 409 }
2687 ... 410 
2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
2694 ... 417             !matches!(
2695 ... 418                 *term,
2696 ... 419                 "the"
2697 ... 420                     | "and"
2698 ... 421                     | "with"
2699 ... 422                     | "from"
2700 ... 423                     | "into"
2701 ... 424                     | "that"
2702 ... 425                     | "this"
2703 ... 426                     | "what"
2704 ... 427                     | "when"
2705 ... 428                     | "where"
2706 ... 429                     | "which"
2707 ... 430                     | "would"
2708 ... 431                     | "could"
2709 ... 432                     | "should"
2710 ... 433                     | "about"
2711 ... 434                     | "your"
2712 ... 435             )
2713 ... 436         })
2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
2718 ... 441     terms
2719 ... 442 }

2836  ...  826     pub fn select_planner_action(
2837  ...  827         &self,
2838  ...  828         request: &PlannerRequest,
2839  ...  829     ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
2840  ...  830         let mut conversation = self.conversation_factory.start_conversation()?;
2841  ...  831         let mut reply = self.send_to_model(
2842  ...  832             conversation.as_mut(),
2843  ...  833             &build_planner_action_prompt(&PlannerPrompt {
2844  ...  834                 workspace_root: &request.workspace_root,
2845  ...  835                 user_prompt: &request.user_prompt,
2846  ...  836                 interpretation: &request.interpretation,
2847  ...  837                 request,
2848  ...  838             }),
2849  ...  839         )?;
2850  ...  840 
2851  ...  841         if is_blank_model_reply(&reply) || parse_planner_action(&reply)?.is_none() {
2852  ...  842             self.log_retry_reason(
2853  ...  843                 "planner-retry",
2854  ...  844                 &reply,
2855  ...  845                 "missing or invalid planner action response",
2856  ...  846             );
2857  ...  847             reply =
2858  ...  848                 self.send_to_model(conversation.as_mut(), &build_planner_retry_prompt(request))?;
2859  ...  849         }
2860  ...  850 
2861  ...  851         if let Some(decision) = parse_planner_action(&reply)? {
2862  ...  852             return Ok(decision);
2863  ...  853         }
2864  ...  854 
2865  ...  855         self.log_retry_reason(
2866  ...  856             "planner-fallback",
2867  ...  857             &reply,
2868  ...  858             "falling back to bounded heuristic planner action",
2869  ...  859         );
2870  ...  860         Ok(fallback_planner_action(request))
2871  ...  861     }

3040 .... 1593     format!(
3041 .... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\

3043 .... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
3044 .... 1597 \n\
3045 .... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
3046 .... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3047 .... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3048 .... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3049 .... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3050 .... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3051 .... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
3052 .... 1605 \n\
3053 .... 1606 Rules:\n\
3054 .... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
3055 .... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
3056 .... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
3057 .... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
3058 .... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
3059 .... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
3060 .... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\

3073 .... 1626 {}\n\

3169 .... 1984 fn format_recent_turn_list(turns: &[String]) -> String {

3172 .... 1987     }

3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
3182 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
3183 .... 1998         .budget
3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
3186 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
3188 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
3189 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
3190 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
3191 .... 2006     )];
3192 .... 2007 
3193 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
3194 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
3195 .... 2010     } else {
3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
3197 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
3198 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
3199 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
3200 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
3201 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
3202 .... 2017             ));
3203 .... 2018         }
3204 .... 2019     }
3205 .... 2020 
3206 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
3207 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
3208 .... 2023         for item in request
3209 .... 2024             .loop_state
3210 .... 2025             .evidence_items
3211 .... 2026             .iter()
3212 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
3213 .... 2028         {
3214 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
3215 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
3216 .... 2031                 item.source,
3217 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
3218 .... 2033             ));
3219 .... 2034         }
3220 .... 2035     }
3221 .... 2036 
3222 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
3223 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
3224 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
3225 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
3226 .... 2041         }
3227 .... 2042     }
3228 .... 2043 
3229 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
3230 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
3231 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
3232 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
3233 .... 2048         ));
3234 .... 2049     }
3235 .... 2050 
3236 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
3237 .... 2052 }

3266 .... 2282 fn parse_planner_action(response: &str) -> Result<Option<RecursivePlannerDecision>> {
3267 .... 2283     let trimmed = response.trim();
3268 .... 2284     let Some(json) = extract_json_payload(trimmed) else {
3269 .... 2285         return Ok(None);
3270 .... 2286     };
3271 .... 2287     let Ok(action) = serde_json::from_str::<PlannerActionEnvelope>(json) else {
3272 .... 2288         return Ok(None);
3273 .... 2289     };
3274 .... 2290 
3275 .... 2291     Ok(Some(planner_action_from_envelope(action)?))
3276 .... 2292 }
3277 .... 2293 
3278 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
3279 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
3280 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
3281 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
3282 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
3283 .... 2299             query,
3284 .... 2300             intent,
3285 .... 2301             rationale,
3286 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
3287 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
3288 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
3289 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
3290 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
3291 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
3292 .... 2308                 }),
3293 .... 2309             },
3294 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
3295 .... 2311         },
3296 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
3297 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
3298 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
3299 .... 2315             },
3300 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
3301 .... 2317         },
3302 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
3303 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
3304 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
3305 .... 2321             },
3306 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
3307 .... 2323         },
3308 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
3309 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
3310 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
3311 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
3312 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
3313 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
3314 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
3315 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
3316 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
3317 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
3318 .... 2334                 },
3319 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
3320 .... 2336             }
3321 .... 2337         }
3322 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
3323 .... 2339             branches,
3324 .... 2340             rationale,
3325 .... 2341         } => {
3326 .... 2342             let branches = branches
3327 .... 2343                 .into_iter()
3328 .... 2344                 .map(|branch| branch.trim().to_string())
3329 .... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
3330 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
3331 .... 2347             if branches.is_empty() {
3332 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
3333 .... 2349             }
3334 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
3335 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
3336 .... 2352                     branches,
3337 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
3338 .... 2354                 },
3339 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
3340 .... 2356             }
3341 .... 2357         }
3342 .... 2358         PlannerActionEnvelope::Stop { reason, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
3343 .... 2359             action: PlannerAction::Stop {
3344 .... 2360                 reason: required_planner_field("reason", reason)?,
3345 .... 2361             },
3346 .... 2362             rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "stop planning".to_string()),
3347 .... 2363         },
3348 .... 2364     };
3349 .... 2365 
3350 .... 2366     Ok(decision)
3351 .... 2367 }
3352 .... 2368 
3353 .... 2369 fn required_planner_field(name: &str, value: String) -> Result<String> {
3354 .... 2370     let trimmed = value.trim();
3355 .... 2371     if trimmed.is_empty() {
3356 .... 2372         bail!("planner field `{name}` must not be empty");
3357 .... 2373     }
3358 .... 2374     Ok(trimmed.to_string())
3359 .... 2375 }
3360 .... 2376 
3361 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
3362 .... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {
3363 .... 2379         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
3364 .... 2380             action: PlannerAction::Search {
3365 .... 2381                 query: branch.clone(),
3366 .... 2382                 intent: Some("queued planner branch".to_string()),
3367 .... 2383             },
3368 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
3369 .... 2385         };
3370 .... 2386     }
3371 .... 2387 
3372 .... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
3373 .... 2389         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
3374 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {
3375 .... 2391                 query: fallback_planner_query(&request.user_prompt),
3376 .... 2392                 intent: Some("initial planner fallback".to_string()),
3377 .... 2393             },
3378 .... 2394             rationale: "start with a bounded workspace search when the planner reply is invalid"
3379 .... 2395                 .to_string(),
3380 .... 2396         };
3381 .... 2397     }
3382 .... 2398 
3383 .... 2399     RecursivePlannerDecision {
3384 .... 2400         action: PlannerAction::Stop {
3385 .... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
3386 .... 2402         },
3387 .... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"
3388 .... 2404             .to_string(),
3389 .... 2405     }
3390 .... 2406 }
3391 .... 2407 
3392 .... 2408 fn fallback_planner_query(user_prompt: &str) -> String {
3393 .... 2409     let query = user_prompt.trim();
3394 .... 2410     if query.is_empty() {
3395 .... 2411         "workspace context".to_string()
3396 .... 2412     } else {
3397 .... 2413         query.to_string()
3398 .... 2414     }
3399 .... 2415 }

  32 .keel/epics/VFDv1i61H/voyages/VFDv3gE5m/RECURSIVE_PLANNER_PROOF.md --- Text
  33  1 # Recursive Planner Proof
  34  2 
  35  3 ## Implemented Backbone
  36  4 
  37  5 - Interpretation-time operator memory now includes `AGENTS.md` plus linked foundational guidance excerpts in [agent_memory.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs).
  38  6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
  39  7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
  40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
  41  9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).
  42 10

  76 11

  79 14 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
  80 15 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
  81 16 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).

 138   40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).

2605 2507 ... 177 fn interpretation_kind_score(kind: MemoryDocumentKind) -> usize {
2606 2508 ... 178     match kind {
2607 2509 ... 179         MemoryDocumentKind::AgentMemory => 10,
2608 2510 ... 180         MemoryDocumentKind::LinkedGuidance => 0,
2609 2511 ... 181     }
2610 2512 ... 182 }

2612 2514 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
2613 2515 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
2614 2516 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
2615 2517 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
2616 2518 ... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
2617 2519 ... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
2618 2520 ... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
2619 2521 ... 191         return Ok(None);
2620 2522 ... 192     }
2621 2523 ... 193 
2622 2524 ... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
2623 2525 ... 195         path,
2624 2526 ... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
2625 2527 ... 197         kind,
2626 2528 ... 198     }))
2627 2529 ... 199 }

2636 2538 ... 255 fn canonical_memory_path(path: &Path) -> PathBuf {
2637 2539 ... 256     path.canonicalize().unwrap_or_else(|_| path.to_path_buf())
2638 2540 ... 257 }

2640 2542 156 259 fn default_user_memory_path() -> Option<PathBuf> {
2641 2543 157 260     env::var_os("HOME").map(|home| PathBuf::from(home).join(USER_MEMORY_RELATIVE_PATH))
2642 2544 158 261 }

2644 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
2645 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
2646 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
2647 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
2648 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
2649 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
2650 2552 ... 269     {
2651 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
2652 2554 ... 271             continue;
2653 2555 ... 272         };
2654 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
2655 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
2656 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
2657 2559 ... 276         }
2658 2560 ... 277     }
2659 2561 ... 278     ordered
2660 2562 ... 279 }
2661 2563 ... 280 
2662 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2663 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
2664 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
2665 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
2666 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
2667 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
2668 2570 ... 287             break;
2669 2571 ... 288         };
2670 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
2671 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
2672 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
2673 2575 ... 292         }
2674 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
2675 2577 ... 294     }
2676 2578 ... 295     targets
2677 2579 ... 296 }
2678 2580 ... 297 
2679 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2680 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
2681 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
2682 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
2683 2585 ... 302 
2684 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
2685 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
2686 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
2687 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
2688 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
2689 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
2690 2592 ... 309                 }
2691 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
2692 2594 ... 311             }
2693 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
2694 2596 ... 313             continue;
2695 2597 ... 314         }
2696 2598 ... 315 
2697 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
2698 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
2699 2601 ... 318         }
2700 2602 ... 319     }
2701 2603 ... 320 
2702 2604 ... 321     targets
2703 2605 ... 322 }
2704 2606 ... 323 
2705 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
2706 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
2707 2609 ... 326 }
2708 2610 ... 327 
2709 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
2710 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
2711 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
2712 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
2713 2615 ... 332     {
2714 2616 ... 333         return None;
2715 2617 ... 334     }
2716 2618 ... 335 
2717 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
2718 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
2719 2621 ... 338         return None;
2720 2622 ... 339     }
2721 2623 ... 340 
2722 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
2723 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
2724 2626 ... 343     } else {
2725 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
2726 2628 ... 345     };
2727 2629 ... 346 
2728 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
2729 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
2730 2632 ... 349     } else {
2731 2633 ... 350         None
2732 2634 ... 351     }
2733 2635 ... 352 }

2736 2638 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {

2742 2644 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
2743 2645 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
2744 2646 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)

2749 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
2750 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
2751 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
2752 2654 ... 377 
2753 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
2754 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
2755 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
2756 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
2757 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
2758 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
2759 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
2760 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
2761 2663 ... 386                 .count();
2762 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
2763 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
2764 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
2765 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
2766 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
2767 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
2768 2670 ... 393                     break;
2769 2671 ... 394                 }
2770 2672 ... 395             }
2771 2673 ... 396         }
2772 2674 ... 397     }
2773 2675 ... 398 
2774 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
2775 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
2776 2678 ... 401             lines
2777 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
2778 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
2779 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
2780 2682 ... 405         );
2781 2683 ... 406     }
2782 2684 ... 407 
2783 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
2784 2686 ... 409 }
2785 2687 ... 410 
2786 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
2787 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
2788 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
2789 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
2790 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
2791 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
2792 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
2793 2695 ... 418                 *term,
2794 2696 ... 419                 "the"
2795 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
2796 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
2797 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
2798 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
2799 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
2800 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
2801 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
2802 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
2803 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
2804 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
2805 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
2806 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
2807 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
2808 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
2809 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
2810 2712 ... 435             )
2811 2713 ... 436         })
2812 2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
2813 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2814 2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
2815 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
2816 2718 ... 441     terms
2817 2719 ... 442 }

3137 3039 .... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {

3279 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
3280 3182 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
3281 3183 .... 1998         .budget
3282 3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
3283 3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
3284 3186 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
3285 3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
3286 3188 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
3287 3189 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
3288 3190 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
3289 3191 .... 2006     )];
3290 3192 .... 2007 
3291 3193 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
3292 3194 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
3293 3195 .... 2010     } else {
3294 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
3295 3197 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
3296 3198 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
3297 3199 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
3298 3200 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
3299 3201 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
3300 3202 .... 2017             ));
3301 3203 .... 2018         }
3302 3204 .... 2019     }
3303 3205 .... 2020 
3304 3206 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
3305 3207 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
3306 3208 .... 2023         for item in request
3307 3209 .... 2024             .loop_state
3308 3210 .... 2025             .evidence_items
3309 3211 .... 2026             .iter()
3310 3212 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
3311 3213 .... 2028         {
3312 3214 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
3313 3215 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
3314 3216 .... 2031                 item.source,
3315 3217 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
3316 3218 .... 2033             ));
3317 3219 .... 2034         }
3318 3220 .... 2035     }
3319 3221 .... 2036 
3320 3222 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
3321 3223 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
3322 3224 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
3323 3225 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
3324 3226 .... 2041         }
3325 3227 .... 2042     }
3326 3228 .... 2043 
3327 3229 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {

3329 3231 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
3330 3232 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")

3332 3234 .... 2049     }

4851 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
4852 ...  571         &self,
4853 ...  572         prompt: &str,
4854 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
4855 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
4856 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
4857 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
4858 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
4859 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
4860 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
4861 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
4862 ...  581             .prepared
4863 ...  582             .gatherer
4864 ...  583             .as_ref()
4865 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
4866 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
4867 ...  586 
4868 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
4869 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
4870 ...  589                 prompt,
4871 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
4872 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
4873 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
4874 ...  593             )
4875 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
4876 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
4877 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
4878 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
4879 ...  598                 sequence,
4880 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
4881 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
4882 ...  601             });
4883 ...  602 
4884 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
4885 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
4886 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
4887 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
4888 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
4889 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
4890 ...  609                         });
4891 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
4892 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
4893 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
4894 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
4895 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
4896 ...  615                                     intent
4897 ...  616                                         .clone()
4898 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
4899 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
4900 ...  619                                 )
4901 ...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
4902 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
4903 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
4904 ...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
4905 ...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
4906 ...  625                                         &loop_state,
4907 ...  626                                     ),
4908 ...  627                                 );
4909 ...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
4910 ...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
4911 ...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
4912 ...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
4913 ...  632                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
4914 ...  633                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
4915 ...  634                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
4916 ...  635                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
4917 ...  636                                                     &self.workspace_root,
4918 ...  637                                                     bundle,
4919 ...  638                                                 ),
4920 ...  639                                             });
4921 ...  640                                             if let Some(planner) = bundle.planner.as_ref() {
4922 ...  641                                                 event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
4923 ...  642                                                     strategy: format_planner_strategy(
4924 ...  643                                                         &planner.strategy,
4925 ...  644                                                     )
4926 ...  645                                                     .to_string(),
4927 ...  646                                                     turns: planner.turn_count,
4928 ...  647                                                     steps: planner.steps.len(),
4929 ...  648                                                     stop_reason: planner.stop_reason.clone(),
4930 ...  649                                                 });
4931 ...  650                                             }
4932 ...  651                                             merge_evidence_items(
4933 ...  652                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
4934 ...  653                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
4935 ...  654                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
4936 ...  655                                             );
4937 ...  656                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
4938 ...  657                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
4939 ...  658                                             bundle.summary.clone()
4940 ...  659                                         } else {
4941 ...  660                                             "planner search returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
4942 ...  661                                         }
4943 ...  662                                     }
4944 ...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
4945 ...  664                                 }
4946 ...  665                             }
4947 ...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
4948 ...  667                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
4949 ...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
4950 ...  669                             }
4951 ...  670                         }
4952 ...  671                     } else {
4953 ...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
4954 ...  673                     }
4955 ...  674                 }
4956 ...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
4957 ...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
4958 ...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());
4959 ...  678                         "planner read budget exhausted".to_string()
4960 ...  679                     } else {
4961 ...  680                         let (source, snippet) = read_planner_file(&self.workspace_root, path)?;
4962 ...  681                         append_evidence_item(
4963 ...  682                             &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
4964 ...  683                             EvidenceItem {
4965 ...  684                                 source: source.clone(),
4966 ...  685                                 snippet,
4967 ...  686                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
4968 ...  687                                 rank: 0,
4969 ...  688                             },
4970 ...  689                             budget.max_evidence_items,
4971 ...  690                         );
4972 ...  691                         used_workspace_resources = true;
4973 ...  692                         format!("read {source}")
4974 ...  693                     }
4975 ...  694                 }
4976 ...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
4977 ...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
4978 ...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());

4990 ...  709                             budget.max_evidence_items,
4991 ...  710                         );
4992 ...  711                         used_workspace_resources = true;
4993 ...  712                         format!("inspected {command}")
4994 ...  713                     }
4995 ...  714                 }
4996 ...  715                 PlannerAction::Refine { query, .. } => {
4997 ...  716                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
4998 ...  717                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
4999 ...  718                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
5000 ...  719                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
5001 ...  720                         });
5002 ...  721                         match gatherer.capability() {
5003 ...  722                             GathererCapability::Available => {
5004 ...  723                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
5005 ...  724                                     query.clone(),
5006 ...  725                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
5007 ...  726                                     "planner-refine",
5008 ...  727                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
5009 ...  728                                 )
5010 ...  729                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
5011 ...  730                                 .with_prior_context(
5012 ...  731                                     build_planner_prior_context(
5013 ...  732                                         &context.interpretation,
5014 ...  733                                         &context.recent_turns,
5015 ...  734                                         &loop_state,
5016 ...  735                                     ),
5017 ...  736                                 );
5018 ...  737                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
5019 ...  738                                     Ok(result) => {
5020 ...  739                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
5021 ...  740                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
5022 ...  741                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
5023 ...  742                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),

5027 ...  746                                                     bundle,

5033 ...  752                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
5034 ...  753                                             );
5035 ...  754                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
5036 ...  755                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
5037 ...  756                                             format!("refined search toward `{query}`")
5038 ...  757                                         } else {
5039 ...  758                                             "planner refine returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
5040 ...  759                                         }
5041 ...  760                                     }
5042 ...  761                                     Err(err) => format!("planner refine failed: {err:#}"),
5043 ...  762                                 }
5044 ...  763                             }
5045 ...  764                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }

5048 ...  767                             }
5049 ...  768                         }
5050 ...  769                     } else {
5051 ...  770                         "no gatherer backend is configured for refined planner search".to_string()
5052 ...  771                     }
5053 ...  772                 }
5054 ...  773                 PlannerAction::Branch { branches, .. } => {
5055 ...  774                     for branch in branches.iter().take(budget.max_branch_factor) {
5056 ...  775                         if !loop_state.pending_branches.contains(branch) {
5057 ...  776                             loop_state.pending_branches.push(branch.clone());
5058 ...  777                         }
5059 ...  778                     }

5068 ...  787                 }

5072 ...  791                 sequence,

5074 ...  793                 outcome: outcome.clone(),
5075 ...  794             });
5076 ...  795

5078 ...  797                 break;
5079 ...  798             }
5080 ...  799 
5081 ...  800             if stop_reason.is_some() {
5082 ...  801                 break;
5083 ...  802             }
5084 ...  803         }
5085 ...  804 
5086 ...  805         let completed = stop_reason.is_some();
5087 ...  806         let stop_reason = stop_reason.unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-budget-exhausted".to_string());
5088 ...  807         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {

5097 ...  816         }

6069 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
6070 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
6071 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
6072 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {

6076 ... 191         return Ok(None);
6077 ... 192     }
6078 ... 193 
6079 ... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
6080 ... 195         path,
6081 ... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
6082 ... 197         kind,
6083 ... 198     }))

6101 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
6102 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
6103 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
6104 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
6105 ... 267         .into_iter()
6106 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
6107 ... 269     {
6108 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
6109 ... 271             continue;
6110 ... 272         };
6111 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
6112 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
6113 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
6114 ... 276         }
6115 ... 277     }
6116 ... 278     ordered
6117 ... 279 }
6118 ... 280 
6119 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
6120 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
6121 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
6122 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
6123 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
6124 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
6125 ... 287             break;
6126 ... 288         };
6127 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
6128 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
6129 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
6130 ... 292         }
6131 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
6132 ... 294     }
6133 ... 295     targets
6134 ... 296 }
6135 ... 297 
6136 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
6137 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
6138 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
6139 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
6140 ... 302 
6141 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
6142 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
6143 ... 305             if in_tick {
6144 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
6145 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
6146 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
6147 ... 309                 }
6148 ... 310                 current.clear();
6149 ... 311             }
6150 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
6151 ... 313             continue;
6152 ... 314         }
6153 ... 315 
6154 ... 316         if in_tick {
6155 ... 317             current.push(ch);
6156 ... 318         }
6157 ... 319     }
6158 ... 320 
6159 ... 321     targets
6160 ... 322 }
6161 ... 323 
6162 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
6163 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
6164 ... 326 }
6165 ... 327 
6166 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
6167 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
6168 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
6169 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
6170 ... 332     {
6171 ... 333         return None;
6172 ... 334     }
6173 ... 335 
6174 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
6175 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
6176 ... 338         return None;
6177 ... 339     }
6178 ... 340 
6179 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
6180 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
6181 ... 343     } else {
6182 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
6183 ... 345     };
6184 ... 346 
6185 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
6186 ... 348         Some(candidate)
6187 ... 349     } else {
6188 ... 350         None
6189 ... 351     }
6190 ... 352 }
6191 159 353 
6192 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
6193 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
6194 
6195 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
6196 170 364     trimmed
6197 171 365 }

6199 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
6200 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
6201 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
6202 ... 370         .display()
6203 ... 371         .to_string()
6204 ... 372 }
6205 ... 373 
6206 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
6207 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
6208 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
6209 ... 377 
6210 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
6211 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
6212 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
6213 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
6214 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
6215 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
6216 ... 384                 .iter()
6217 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
6218 ... 386                 .count();
6219 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
6220 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
6221 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
6222 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
6223 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
6224 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
6225 ... 393                     break;
6226 ... 394                 }
6227 ... 395             }
6228 ... 396         }
6229 ... 397     }
6230 ... 398 
6231 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
6232 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
6233 ... 401             lines
6234 ... 402                 .into_iter()
6235 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
6236 ... 404                 .take(8),
6237 ... 405         );
6238 ... 406     }
6239 ... 407 
6240 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
6241 ... 409 }
6242 ... 410 
6243 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
6244 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
6245 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
6246 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
6247 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
6248 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
6249 ... 417             !matches!(
6250 ... 418                 *term,
6251 ... 419                 "the"
6252 ... 420                     | "and"
6253 ... 421                     | "with"
6254 ... 422                     | "from"
6255 ... 423                     | "into"
6256 ... 424                     | "that"
6257 ... 425                     | "this"
6258 ... 426                     | "what"
6259 ... 427                     | "when"
6260 ... 428                     | "where"
6261 ... 429                     | "which"
6262 ... 430                     | "would"
6263 ... 431                     | "could"
6264 ... 432                     | "should"
6265 ... 433                     | "about"
6266 ... 434                     | "your"
6267 ... 435             )
6268 ... 436         })
6269 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
6270 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
6271 ... 439     terms.sort();
6272 ... 440     terms.dedup();
6273 ... 441     terms
6274 ... 442 }

6736 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
6737 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
6738 .... 1998         .budget
6739 .... 1999         .max_steps
6740 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
6741 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
6742 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
6743 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
6744 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
6745 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
6746 .... 2006     )];
6747 .... 2007 
6748 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
6749 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
6750 .... 2010     } else {
6751 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
6752 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
6753 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
6754 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
6755 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
6756 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
6757 .... 2017             ));
6758 .... 2018         }
6759 .... 2019     }
6760 .... 2020 
6761 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
6762 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
6763 .... 2023         for item in request
6764 .... 2024             .loop_state
6765 .... 2025             .evidence_items
6766 .... 2026             .iter()
6767 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
6768 .... 2028         {
6769 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
6770 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
6771 .... 2031                 item.source,
6772 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
6773 .... 2033             ));
6774 .... 2034         }
6775 .... 2035     }
6776 .... 2036 
6777 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
6778 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
6779 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
6780 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
6781 .... 2041         }
6782 .... 2042     }
6783 .... 2043 
6784 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
6785 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
6786 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
6787 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
6788 .... 2048         ));
6789 .... 2049     }
6790 .... 2050 
6791 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
6792 .... 2052 }

6833 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
6834 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
6835 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
6836 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
6837 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
6838 .... 2299             query,
6839 .... 2300             intent,
6840 .... 2301             rationale,
6841 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
6842 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {

6844 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
6845 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
6846 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
6847 .... 2308                 }),
6848 .... 2309             },
6849 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
6850 .... 2311         },
6851 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
6852 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
6853 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
6854 .... 2315             },
6855 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
6856 .... 2317         },
6857 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
6858 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
6859 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
6860 .... 2321             },
6861 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
6862 .... 2323         },
6863 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
6864 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
6865 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
6866 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
6867 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
6868 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
6869 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
6870 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
6871 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
6872 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
6873 .... 2334                 },
6874 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
6875 .... 2336             }
6876 .... 2337         }
6877 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
6878 .... 2339             branches,
6879 .... 2340             rationale,
6880 .... 2341         } => {

6882 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

6887 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
6888 .... 2349             }

6890 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
6891 .... 2352                     branches,
6892 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
6893 .... 2354                 },
6894 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
6895 .... 2356             }

6916 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {

6923 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
6924 .... 2385         };

6941 .... 2402         },

   33  1 # Recursive Planner Proof
   34  2 
   35  3 ## Implemented Backbone
   36  4 
   37  5 - Interpretation-time operator memory now includes `AGENTS.md` plus linked foundational guidance excerpts in [agent_memory.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs).
   38  6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
   39  7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
   40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
   41  9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).

  176  103 13 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
  177  104 14 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
  178  105 15 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
  179  106 16 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).
  180  107 17

 1369 1296 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
 1370 1297 ...  571         &self,
 1371 1298 ...  572         prompt: &str,
 1372 1299 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
 1373 1300 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
 1374 1301 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
 1375 1302 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
 1376 1303 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
 1377 1304 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;

 1380 1307 ...  581             .prepared
