 2619 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 2620 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 2621 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 2622 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 2623 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
 2624 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 2625 2552 ... 269     {
 2626 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 2627 2554 ... 271             continue;
 2628 2555 ... 272         };
 2629 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 2630 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 2631 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 2632 2559 ... 276         }
 2633 2560 ... 277     }
 2634 2561 ... 278     ordered
 2635 2562 ... 279 }
 2636 2563 ... 280 
 2637 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2638 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 2639 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 2640 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 2641 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 2642 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 2643 2570 ... 287             break;
 2644 2571 ... 288         };
 2645 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 2646 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 2647 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 2648 2575 ... 292         }
 2649 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 2650 2577 ... 294     }
 2651 2578 ... 295     targets
 2652 2579 ... 296 }
 2653 2580 ... 297 
 2654 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2655 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 2656 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 2657 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 2658 2585 ... 302 
 2659 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 2660 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 2661 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
 2662 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 2663 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 2664 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 2665 2592 ... 309                 }
 2666 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
 2667 2594 ... 311             }
 2668 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 2669 2596 ... 313             continue;
 2670 2597 ... 314         }
 2671 2598 ... 315 
 2672 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
 2673 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 2674 2601 ... 318         }
 2675 2602 ... 319     }
 2676 2603 ... 320 
 2677 2604 ... 321     targets
 2678 2605 ... 322 }
 2679 2606 ... 323 
 2680 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 2681 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 2682 2609 ... 326 }
 2683 2610 ... 327 
 2684 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 2685 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 2686 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 2687 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 2688 2615 ... 332     {
 2689 2616 ... 333         return None;
 2690 2617 ... 334     }
 2691 2618 ... 335 
 2692 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 2693 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 2694 2621 ... 338         return None;
 2695 2622 ... 339     }
 2696 2623 ... 340 
 2697 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 2698 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 2699 2626 ... 343     } else {
 2700 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 2701 2628 ... 345     };
 2702 2629 ... 346 
 2703 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 2704 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 2705 2632 ... 349     } else {
 2706 2633 ... 350         None
 2707 2634 ... 351     }
 2708 2635 ... 352 }
 2709 2636 159 353 
 2710 2637 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
 2711 2638 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
 2712 2639 
 2713 2640 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
 2714 2641 170 364     trimmed
 2715 2642 171 365 }
 2716 2643 ... 366 
 2717 2644 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
 2718 2645 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
 2719 2646 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
 2720 2647 ... 370         .display()
 2721 2648 ... 371         .to_string()
 2722 2649 ... 372 }
 2723 2650 ... 373 
 2724 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 2725 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 2726 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 2727 2654 ... 377 
 2728 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 2729 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 2730 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 2731 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 2732 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 2733 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 2734 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
 2735 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 2736 2663 ... 386                 .count();
 2737 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 2738 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 2739 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 2740 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 2741 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 2742 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 2743 2670 ... 393                     break;
 2744 2671 ... 394                 }
 2745 2672 ... 395             }
 2746 2673 ... 396         }
 2747 2674 ... 397     }
 2748 2675 ... 398 
 2749 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 2750 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 2751 2678 ... 401             lines
 2752 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 2753 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 2754 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
 2755 2682 ... 405         );
 2756 2683 ... 406     }
 2757 2684 ... 407 
 2758 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 2759 2686 ... 409 }
 2760 2687 ... 410 
 2761 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2762 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 2763 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 2764 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 2765 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 2766 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 2767 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
 2768 2695 ... 418                 *term,
 2769 2696 ... 419                 "the"
 2770 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
 2771 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
 2772 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
 2773 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
 2774 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
 2775 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
 2776 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
 2777 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
 2778 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
 2779 2706 ... 429                     | "which"

 3112 3039 .... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {
 3113 3040 .... 1593     format!(
 3114 3041 .... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
 3115 3042 .... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
 3116 3043 .... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
 3117 3044 .... 1597 \n\
 3118 3045 .... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
 3119 3046 .... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3120 3047 .... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3121 3048 .... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3122 3049 .... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3123 3050 .... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3124 3051 .... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3125 3052 .... 1605 \n\
 3126 3053 .... 1606 Rules:\n\
 3127 3054 .... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
 3128 3055 .... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
 3129 3056 .... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
 3130 3057 .... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
 3131 3058 .... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
 3132 3059 .... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
 3133 3060 .... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\
 3134 3061 .... 1614 - Inspect commands must stay read-only.\n\
 3135 3062 .... 1615 \n\
 3136 3063 .... 1616 Workspace root:\n\
 3137 3064 .... 1617 {}\n\
 3138 3065 .... 1618 \n\
 3139 3066 .... 1619 Interpretation context:\n\
 3140 3067 .... 1620 {}\n\
 3141 3068 .... 1621 \n\

 3143 3070 .... 1623 {}\n\
 3144 3071 .... 1624 \n\
 3145 3072 .... 1625 Current loop state:\n\
 3146 3073 .... 1626 {}\n\
 3147 3074 .... 1627 \n\
 3148 3075 .... 1628 Current user request:\n\
 3149 3076 .... 1629 {}\n",
 3150 3077 .... 1630         prompt.workspace_root.display(),
 3151 3078 .... 1631         format_interpretation_context_digest(prompt.interpretation),
 3152 3079 .... 1632         format_recent_turn_list(&prompt.request.recent_turns),
 3153 3080 .... 1633         format_planner_loop_state_digest(prompt.request),
 3154 3081 .... 1634         prompt.user_prompt,
 3155 3082 .... 1635     )
 3156 3083 .... 1636 }

 3254 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {

 3256 3183 .... 1998         .budget

 3269 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {

 3291 3218 .... 2033             ));

 3296 3223 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());

 3691   38  6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
 3692   39  7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
 3693   40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
 3694   41  9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).

 5433 1780 1682 ...                                      948 fn build_planner_prior_context(
 5434 1781 1683 ...                                      949     interpretation: &Interpretation
 5435 1782 1684 ...                                      ... Context,
 5436 1783 1685 ...                                      950     recent_turns: &[String],
 5437 1784 1686 ...                                      951     loop_state: &PlannerLoopState,
 5438 1785 1687 ...                                      952 ) -> Vec<String> {
 5439 1786 1688 ...                                      953     let mut prior = Vec::new();
 5440 1787 1689 ...                                      954     if !interpretation.is_empty() {
 5441 1788 1690 ...                                      955         prior.push(interpretation.r
 5442 1789 1691 ...                                      ... ender());
 5443 1790 1692 ...                                      956     }
 5444 1791 1693 ...                                      957     prior.extend(recent_turns.iter(
 5445 1792 1694 ...                                      ... ).cloned());
 5446 1793 1695 ...                                      958     prior.extend(
 5447 1794 1696 ...                                      959         loop_state

 6266 2613 2515 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
 6267 2614 2516 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
 6268 2615 2517 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {

 6270 2617 2519 ... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();

 6272 2619 2521 ... 191         return Ok(None);

 6279 2626 2528 ... 198     }))

 6297 2644 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 6298 2645 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 6299 2646 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 6300 2647 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 6301 2648 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
 6302 2649 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 6303 2650 2552 ... 269     {
 6304 2651 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 6305 2652 2554 ... 271             continue;
 6306 2653 2555 ... 272         };
 6307 2654 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 6308 2655 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 6309 2656 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 6310 2657 2559 ... 276         }
 6311 2658 2560 ... 277     }
 6312 2659 2561 ... 278     ordered
 6313 2660 2562 ... 279 }
 6314 2661 2563 ... 280 
 6315 2662 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6316 2663 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 6317 2664 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 6318 2665 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 6319 2666 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 6320 2667 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 6321 2668 2570 ... 287             break;
 6322 2669 2571 ... 288         };
 6323 2670 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 6324 2671 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 6325 2672 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 6326 2673 2575 ... 292         }
 6327 2674 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 6328 2675 2577 ... 294     }
 6329 2676 2578 ... 295     targets
 6330 2677 2579 ... 296 }
 6331 2678 2580 ... 297 
 6332 2679 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6333 2680 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 6334 2681 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 6335 2682 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 6336 2683 2585 ... 302 
 6337 2684 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 6338 2685 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 6339 2686 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
 6340 2687 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 6341 2688 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 6342 2689 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 6343 2690 2592 ... 309                 }
 6344 2691 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
 6345 2692 2594 ... 311             }
 6346 2693 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 6347 2694 2596 ... 313             continue;
 6348 2695 2597 ... 314         }
 6349 2696 2598 ... 315 
 6350 2697 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
 6351 2698 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 6352 2699 2601 ... 318         }
 6353 2700 2602 ... 319     }
 6354 2701 2603 ... 320 
 6355 2702 2604 ... 321     targets
 6356 2703 2605 ... 322 }
 6357 2704 2606 ... 323 
 6358 2705 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 6359 2706 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 6360 2707 2609 ... 326 }
 6361 2708 2610 ... 327 
 6362 2709 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 6363 2710 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 6364 2711 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 6365 2712 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 6366 2713 2615 ... 332     {
 6367 2714 2616 ... 333         return None;
 6368 2715 2617 ... 334     }
 6369 2716 2618 ... 335 
 6370 2717 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 6371 2718 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 6372 2719 2621 ... 338         return None;
 6373 2720 2622 ... 339     }
 6374 2721 2623 ... 340 
 6375 2722 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 6376 2723 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 6377 2724 2626 ... 343     } else {
 6378 2725 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 6379 2726 2628 ... 345     };
 6380 2727 2629 ... 346 
 6381 2728 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 6382 2729 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 6383 2730 2632 ... 349     } else {
 6384 2731 2633 ... 350         None
 6385 2732 2634 ... 351     }
 6386 2733 2635 ... 352 }

 6390 2737 2639

 6393 2740 2642 171 365 }

 6399 2746 2648 ... 371         .to_string()
 6400 2747 2649 ... 372 }

 6402 2749 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 6403 2750 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 6404 2751 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 6405 2752 2654 ... 377 
 6406 2753 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 6407 2754 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 6408 2755 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 6409 2756 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 6410 2757 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 6411 2758 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 6412 2759 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
 6413 2760 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 6414 2761 2663 ... 386                 .count();
 6415 2762 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 6416 2763 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 6417 2764 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 6418 2765 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 6419 2766 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 6420 2767 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 6421 2768 2670 ... 393                     break;
 6422 2769 2671 ... 394                 }
 6423 2770 2672 ... 395             }
 6424 2771 2673 ... 396         }
 6425 2772 2674 ... 397     }
 6426 2773 2675 ... 398 
 6427 2774 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 6428 2775 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 6429 2776 2678 ... 401             lines
 6430 2777 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 6431 2778 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 6432 2779 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
 6433 2780 2682 ... 405         );
 6434 2781 2683 ... 406     }
 6435 2782 2684 ... 407 
 6436 2783 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 6437 2784 2686 ... 409 }
 6438 2785 2687 ... 410 
 6439 2786 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6440 2787 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 6441 2788 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 6442 2789 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 6443 2790 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 6444 2791 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 6445 2792 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
 6446 2793 2695 ... 418                 *term,
 6447 2794 2696 ... 419                 "the"
 6448 2795 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
 6449 2796 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
 6450 2797 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
 6451 2798 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
 6452 2799 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
 6453 2800 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
 6454 2801 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
 6455 2802 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
 6456 2803 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
 6457 2804 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
 6458 2805 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
 6459 2806 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
 6460 2807 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
 6461 2808 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
 6462 2809 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
 6463 2810 2712 ... 435             )
 6464 2811 2713 ... 436         })
 6465 2812 2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
 6466 2813 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 6467 2814 2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
 6468 2815 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
 6469 2816 2718 ... 441     terms
 6470 2817 2719 ... 442 }

 6932 3279 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
 6933 3280 3182 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
 6934 3281 3183 .... 1998         .budget
 6935 3282 3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
 6936 3283 3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
 6937 3284 3186 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
 6938 3285 3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
 6939 3286 3188 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
 6940 3287 3189 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
 6941 3288 3190 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
 6942 3289 3191 .... 2006     )];
 6943 3290 3192 .... 2007 
 6944 3291 3193 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
 6945 3292 3194 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
 6946 3293 3195 .... 2010     } else {
 6947 3294 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
 6948 3295 3197 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
 6949 3296 3198 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
 6950 3297 3199 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
 6951 3298 3200 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
 6952 3299 3201 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
 6953 3300 3202 .... 2017             ));
 6954 3301 3203 .... 2018         }
 6955 3302 3204 .... 2019     }
 6956 3303 3205 .... 2020 
 6957 3304 3206 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
 6958 3305 3207 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
 6959 3306 3208 .... 2023         for item in request
 6960 3307 3209 .... 2024             .loop_state
 6961 3308 3210 .... 2025             .evidence_items
 6962 3309 3211 .... 2026             .iter()

 6964 3311 3213 .... 2028         {
 6965 3312 3214 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
 6966 3313 3215 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
 6967 3314 3216 .... 2031                 item.source,
 6968 3315 3217 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
 6969 3316 3218 .... 2033             ));
 6970 3317 3219 .... 2034         }
 6971 3318 3220 .... 2035     }
 6972 3319 3221 .... 2036 
 6973 3320 3222 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
 6974 3321 3223 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
 6975 3322 3224 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
 6976 3323 3225 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));

 7017 3364 3266 .... 2282 fn parse_planner_action(response: &str) -> Result<Option<RecursivePlannerDecision>> {

 7029 3376 3278 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
 7030 3377 3279 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
 7031 3378 3280 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
 7032 3379 3281 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
 7033 3380 3282 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
 7034 3381 3283 .... 2299             query,
 7035 3382 3284 .... 2300             intent,
 7036 3383 3285 .... 2301             rationale,
 7037 3384 3286 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7038 3385 3287 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
 7039 3386 3288 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
 7040 3387 3289 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
 7041 3388 3290 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
 7042 3389 3291 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
 7043 3390 3292 .... 2308                 }),
 7044 3391 3293 .... 2309             },
 7045 3392 3294 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
 7046 3393 3295 .... 2311         },
 7047 3394 3296 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7048 3395 3297 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
 7049 3396 3298 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
 7050 3397 3299 .... 2315             },
 7051 3398 3300 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
 7052 3399 3301 .... 2317         },
 7053 3400 3302 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7054 3401 3303 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
 7055 3402 3304 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
 7056 3403 3305 .... 2321             },
 7057 3404 3306 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
 7058 3405 3307 .... 2323         },
 7059 3406 3308 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
 7060 3407 3309 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
 7061 3408 3310 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
 7062 3409 3311 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
 7063 3410 3312 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
 7064 3411 3313 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
 7065 3412 3314 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7066 3413 3315 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
 7067 3414 3316 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
 7068 3415 3317 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
 7069 3416 3318 .... 2334                 },
 7070 3417 3319 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
 7071 3418 3320 .... 2336             }
 7072 3419 3321 .... 2337         }
 7073 3420 3322 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
 7074 3421 3323 .... 2339             branches,
 7075 3422 3324 .... 2340             rationale,
 7076 3423 3325 .... 2341         } => {
 7077 3424 3326 .... 2342             let branches = branches
 7078 3425 3327 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

 7080 3427 3329 .... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
 7081 3428 3330 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 7082 3429 3331 .... 2347             if branches.is_empty() {
 7083 3430 3332 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
 7084 3431 3333 .... 2349             }
 7085 3432 3334 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7086 3433 3335 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
 7087 3434 3336 .... 2352                     branches,
 7088 3435 3337 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
 7089 3436 3338 .... 2354                 },
 7090 3437 3339 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
 7091 3438 3340 .... 2356             }
 7092 3439 3341 .... 2357         }
 7093 3440 3342 .... 2358         PlannerActionEnvelope::Stop { reason, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
 7094 3441 3343 .... 2359             action: PlannerAction::Stop {
 7095 3442 3344 .... 2360                 reason: required_planner_field("reason", reason)?,
 7096 3443 3345 .... 2361             },
 7097 3444 3346 .... 2362             rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "stop planning".to_string()),
 7098 3445 3347 .... 2363         },

 7100 3447 3349 .... 2365

 7104 3451 3353 .... 2369 fn required_planner_field(name: &str, value: String) -> Result<String> {
 7105 3452 3354 .... 2370     let trimmed = value.trim();
 7106 3453 3355 .... 2371     if trimmed.is_empty() {
 7107 3454 3356 .... 2372         bail!("planner field `{name}` must not be empty");
 7108 3455 3357 .... 2373     }
 7109 3456 3358 .... 2374     Ok(trimmed.to_string())

 9754 6101 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 9755 6102 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 9756 6103 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 9757 6104 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 9758 6105 ... 267         .into_iter()
 9759 6106 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 9760 6107 ... 269     {
 9761 6108 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 9762 6109 ... 271             continue;
 9763 6110 ... 272         };
 9764 6111 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 9765 6112 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 9766 6113 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 9767 6114 ... 276         }
 9768 6115 ... 277     }
 9769 6116 ... 278     ordered
 9770 6117 ... 279 }
 9771 6118 ... 280 
 9772 6119 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9773 6120 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 9774 6121 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 9775 6122 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 9776 6123 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 9777 6124 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 9778 6125 ... 287             break;
 9779 6126 ... 288         };
 9780 6127 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 9781 6128 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 9782 6129 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 9783 6130 ... 292         }
 9784 6131 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 9785 6132 ... 294     }
 9786 6133 ... 295     targets
 9787 6134 ... 296 }
 9788 6135 ... 297 
 9789 6136 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9790 6137 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 9791 6138 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 9792 6139 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 9793 6140 ... 302 
 9794 6141 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 9795 6142 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 9796 6143 ... 305             if in_tick {
 9797 6144 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 9798 6145 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 9799 6146 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 9800 6147 ... 309                 }
 9801 6148 ... 310                 current.clear();
 9802 6149 ... 311             }
 9803 6150 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 9804 6151 ... 313             continue;
 9805 6152 ... 314         }
 9806 6153 ... 315 
 9807 6154 ... 316         if in_tick {
 9808 6155 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 9809 6156 ... 318         }
 9810 6157 ... 319     }
 9811 6158 ... 320 
 9812 6159 ... 321     targets
 9813 6160 ... 322 }
 9814 6161 ... 323 
 9815 6162 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 9816 6163 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 9817 6164 ... 326 }
 9818 6165 ... 327 
 9819 6166 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 9820 6167 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 9821 6168 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 9822 6169 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 9823 6170 ... 332     {
 9824 6171 ... 333         return None;
 9825 6172 ... 334     }
 9826 6173 ... 335 
 9827 6174 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 9828 6175 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 9829 6176 ... 338         return None;
 9830 6177 ... 339     }
 9831 6178 ... 340 
 9832 6179 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 9833 6180 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 9834 6181 ... 343     } else {
 9835 6182 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 9836 6183 ... 345     };
 9837 6184 ... 346 
 9838 6185 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 9839 6186 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 9840 6187 ... 349     } else {
 9841 6188 ... 350         None
 9842 6189 ... 351     }
 9843 6190 ... 352 }

 9846 6193 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
 9847 6194 
 9848 6195 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
 9849 6196 170 364     trimmed
 9850 6197 171 365 }

 9854 6201 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
 9855 6202 ... 370         .display()

 9859 6206 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 9860 6207 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 9861 6208 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 9862 6209 ... 377 
 9863 6210 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 9864 6211 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 9865 6212 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 9866 6213 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 9867 6214 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 9868 6215 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 9869 6216 ... 384                 .iter()
 9870 6217 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 9871 6218 ... 386                 .count();
 9872 6219 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 9873 6220 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 9874 6221 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 9875 6222 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 9876 6223 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 9877 6224 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 9878 6225 ... 393                     break;
 9879 6226 ... 394                 }
 9880 6227 ... 395             }
 9881 6228 ... 396         }
 9882 6229 ... 397     }
 9883 6230 ... 398 
 9884 6231 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 9885 6232 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 9886 6233 ... 401             lines
 9887 6234 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 9888 6235 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 9889 6236 ... 404                 .take(8),
 9890 6237 ... 405         );
 9891 6238 ... 406     }
 9892 6239 ... 407 
 9893 6240 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 9894 6241 ... 409 }
 9895 6242 ... 410 
 9896 6243 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9897 6244 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 9898 6245 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 9899 6246 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 9900 6247 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 9901 6248 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 9902 6249 ... 417             !matches!(
 9903 6250 ... 418                 *term,
 9904 6251 ... 419                 "the"
 9905 6252 ... 420                     | "and"
 9906 6253 ... 421                     | "with"
 9907 6254 ... 422                     | "from"
 9908 6255 ... 423                     | "into"
 9909 6256 ... 424                     | "that"
 9910 6257 ... 425                     | "this"
 9911 6258 ... 426                     | "what"
 9912 6259 ... 427                     | "when"
 9913 6260 ... 428                     | "where"
 9914 6261 ... 429                     | "which"
 9915 6262 ... 430                     | "would"
 9916 6263 ... 431                     | "could"
 9917 6264 ... 432                     | "should"
 9918 6265 ... 433                     | "about"
 9919 6266 ... 434                     | "your"
 9920 6267 ... 435             )
 9921 6268 ... 436         })
 9922 6269 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
 9923 6270 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 9924 6271 ... 439     terms.sort();
 9925 6272 ... 440     terms.dedup();
 9926 6273 ... 441     terms
 9927 6274 ... 442 }

10389 6736 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
10390 6737 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
10391 6738 .... 1998         .budget
10392 6739 .... 1999         .max_steps
10393 6740 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
10394 6741 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
10395 6742 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
10396 6743 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
10397 6744 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
10398 6745 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
10399 6746 .... 2006     )];
10400 6747 .... 2007 
10401 6748 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
10402 6749 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
10403 6750 .... 2010     } else {
10404 6751 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
10405 6752 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
10406 6753 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
10407 6754 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
10408 6755 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
10409 6756 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
10410 6757 .... 2017             ));
10411 6758 .... 2018         }
10412 6759 .... 2019     }
10413 6760 .... 2020 
10414 6761 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
10415 6762 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
10416 6763 .... 2023         for item in request
10417 6764 .... 2024             .loop_state
10418 6765 .... 2025             .evidence_items
10419 6766 .... 2026             .iter()
10420 6767 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
10421 6768 .... 2028         {
10422 6769 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
10423 6770 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
10424 6771 .... 2031                 item.source,
10425 6772 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
10426 6773 .... 2033             ));
10427 6774 .... 2034         }
10428 6775 .... 2035     }
10429 6776 .... 2036 
10430 6777 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
10431 6778 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
10432 6779 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
10433 6780 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
10434 6781 .... 2041         }
10435 6782 .... 2042     }
10436 6783 .... 2043 
10437 6784 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
10438 6785 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
10439 6786 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
10440 6787 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
10441 6788 .... 2048         ));
10442 6789 .... 2049     }
10443 6790 .... 2050 
10444 6791 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
10445 6792 .... 2052 }

10486 6833 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
10487 6834 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
10488 6835 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
10489 6836 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
10490 6837 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
10491 6838 .... 2299             query,
10492 6839 .... 2300             intent,
10493 6840 .... 2301             rationale,
10494 6841 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
10495 6842 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
10496 6843 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
10497 6844 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
10498 6845 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
10499 6846 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
10500 6847 .... 2308                 }),
10501 6848 .... 2309             },
10502 6849 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
10503 6850 .... 2311         },
10504 6851 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
10505 6852 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
10506 6853 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
10507 6854 .... 2315             },
10508 6855 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
10509 6856 .... 2317         },
10510 6857 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
10511 6858 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
10512 6859 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
10513 6860 .... 2321             },
10514 6861 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
10515 6862 .... 2323         },
10516 6863 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
10517 6864 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
10518 6865 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
10519 6866 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
10520 6867 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
10521 6868 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
10522 6869 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
10523 6870 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
10524 6871 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
10525 6872 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
10526 6873 .... 2334                 },
10527 6874 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
10528 6875 .... 2336             }
10529 6876 .... 2337         }
10530 6877 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
10531 6878 .... 2339             branches,
10532 6879 .... 2340             rationale,
10533 6880 .... 2341         } => {
10534 6881 .... 2342             let branches = branches
10535 6882 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

10537 6884 .... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
10538 6885 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();

10540 6887 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
10541 6888 .... 2349             }
10542 6889 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
10543 6890 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
10544 6891 .... 2352                     branches,
10545 6892 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
10546 6893 .... 2354                 },
10547 6894 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
10548 6895 .... 2356             }

10555 6902 .... 2363         },

10569 6916 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
10570 6917 .... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {
10571 6918 .... 2379         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
10572 6919 .... 2380             action: PlannerAction::Search {
10573 6920 .... 2381                 query: branch.clone(),
10574 6921 .... 2382                 intent: Some("queued planner branch".to_string()),
10575 6922 .... 2383             },
10576 6923 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
10577 6924 .... 2385         };
10578 6925 .... 2386     }
10579 6926 .... 2387 
10580 6927 .... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
10581 6928 .... 2389         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
10582 6929 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {
10583 6930 .... 2391                 query: fallback_planner_query(&request.user_prompt),
10584 6931 .... 2392                 intent: Some("initial planner fallback".to_string()),
10585 6932 .... 2393             },
10586 6933 .... 2394             rationale: "start with a bounded workspace search when the planner reply is invalid"
10587 6934 .... 2395                 .to_string(),
10588 6935 .... 2396         };
10589 6936 .... 2397     }
10590 6937 .... 2398 
10591 6938 .... 2399     RecursivePlannerDecision {
10592 6939 .... 2400         action: PlannerAction::Stop {
10593 6940 .... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
10594 6941 .... 2402         },
10595 6942 .... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"
10596 6943 .... 2404             .to_string(),
10597 6944 .... 2405     }
10598 6945 .... 2406 }
10599 6946 .... 2407 
10600 6947 .... 2408 fn fallback_planner_query(user_prompt: &str) -> String {
10601 6948 .... 2409     let query = user_prompt.trim();
10602 6949 .... 2410     if query.is_empty() {
10603 6950 .... 2411         "workspace context".to_string()
10604 6951 .... 2412     } else {
10605 6952 .... 2413         query.to_string()

12215  1369 1296 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
12216  1370 1297 ...  571         &self,
12217  1371 1298 ...  572         prompt: &str,
12218  1372 1299 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
12219  1373 1300 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
12220  1374 1301 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
12221  1375 1302 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
12222  1376 1303 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
12223  1377 1304 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
12224  1378 1305 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
12225  1379 1306 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
12226  1380 1307 ...  581             .prepared
12227  1381 1308 ...  582             .gatherer
12228  1382 1309 ...  583             .as_ref()
12229  1383 1310 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
12230  1384 1311 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
12231  1385 1312 ...  586 
12232  1386 1313 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
12233  1387 1314 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
12234  1388 1315 ...  589                 prompt,
12235  1389 1316 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
12236  1390 1317 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
12237  1391 1318 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
12238  1392 1319 ...  593             )
12239  1393 1320 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
12240  1394 1321 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
12241  1395 1322 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
12242  1396 1323 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
12243  1397 1324 ...  598                 sequence,
12244  1398 1325 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
12245  1399 1326 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
12246  1400 1327 ...  601             });
12247  1401 1328 ...  602 
12248  1402 1329 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
12249  1403 1330 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
12250  1404 1331 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
12251  1405 1332 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
12252  1406 1333 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
12253  1407 1334 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
12254  1408 1335 ...  609                         });
12255  1409 1336 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
12256  1410 1337 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
12257  1411 1338 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
12258  1412 1339 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
12259  1413 1340 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
12260  1414 1341 ...  615                                     intent
12261  1415 1342 ...  616                                         .clone()
12262  1416 1343 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
12263  1417 1344 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
12264  1418 1345 ...  619                                 )

12266  1420 1347 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
12267  1421 1348 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(

12272  1426 1353 ...  627                                 );

12274  1428 1355 ...  629                                     Ok(result) => {

12276  1430 1357 ...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {

12310  1464 1391 ...  665                             }
12311  1465 1392 ...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }

12318  1472 1399 ...  673                     }
12319  1473 1400 ...  674                 }
12320  1474 1401 ...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {

12337  1491 1418 ...  692                         format!("read {source}")

12339  1493 1420 ...  694                 }
12340  1494 1421 ...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {

13465  2619 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
13466  2620 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
13467  2621 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
13468  2622 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
13469  2623 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
13470  2624 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
13471  2625 2552 ... 269     {
13472  2626 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
13473  2627 2554 ... 271             continue;
13474  2628 2555 ... 272         };
13475  2629 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
13476  2630 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
13477  2631 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
13478  2632 2559 ... 276         }
13479  2633 2560 ... 277     }
13480  2634 2561 ... 278     ordered

13483  2637 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13484  2638 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
13485  2639 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
13486  2640 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
13487  2641 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
13488  2642 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
13489  2643 2570 ... 287             break;
13490  2644 2571 ... 288         };
13491  2645 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
13492  2646 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
13493  2647 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
13494  2648 2575 ... 292         }
13495  2649 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
13496  2650 2577 ... 294     }
13497  2651 2578 ... 295     targets
13498  2652 2579 ... 296 }
13499  2653 2580 ... 297 
13500  2654 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13501  2655 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
13502  2656 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
13503  2657 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
13504  2658 2585 ... 302 
13505  2659 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
13506  2660 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
13507  2661 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
13508  2662 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
13509  2663 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
13510  2664 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
13511  2665 2592 ... 309                 }
13512  2666 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
13513  2667 2594 ... 311             }
13514  2668 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
13515  2669 2596 ... 313             continue;
13516  2670 2597 ... 314         }
13517  2671 2598 ... 315 
13518  2672 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
13519  2673 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
13520  2674 2601 ... 318         }
13521  2675 2602 ... 319     }
13522  2676 2603 ... 320 
13523  2677 2604 ... 321     targets
13524  2678 2605 ... 322 }

13526  2680 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
13527  2681 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
13528  2682 2609 ... 326 }

13530  2684 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
13531  2685 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
13532  2686 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
13533  2687 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
13534  2688 2615 ... 332     {
13535  2689 2616 ... 333         return None;
13536  2690 2617 ... 334     }
13537  2691 2618 ... 335 
13538  2692 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
13539  2693 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
13540  2694 2621 ... 338         return None;
13541  2695 2622 ... 339     }
13542  2696 2623 ... 340 
13543  2697 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
13544  2698 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
13545  2699 2626 ... 343     } else {
13546  2700 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
13547  2701 2628 ... 345     };
13548  2702 2629 ... 346 
13549  2703 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
13550  2704 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
13551  2705 2632 ... 349     } else {
13552  2706 2633 ... 350         None
13553  2707 2634 ... 351     }
13554  2708 2635 ... 352 }

13560  2714 2641 170 364     trimmed

13570  2724 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
13571  2725 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
13572  2726 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
13573  2727 2654 ... 377 
13574  2728 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
13575  2729 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
13576  2730 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
13577  2731 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
13578  2732 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
13579  2733 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
13580  2734 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
13581  2735 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
13582  2736 2663 ... 386                 .count();
13583  2737 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
13584  2738 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
13585  2739 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
13586  2740 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
13587  2741 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
13588  2742 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
13589  2743 2670 ... 393                     break;
13590  2744 2671 ... 394                 }
13591  2745 2672 ... 395             }
13592  2746 2673 ... 396         }
13593  2747 2674 ... 397     }
13594  2748 2675 ... 398 
13595  2749 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
13596  2750 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
13597  2751 2678 ... 401             lines
13598  2752 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
13599  2753 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
13600  2754 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
13601  2755 2682 ... 405         );
13602  2756 2683 ... 406     }
13603  2757 2684 ... 407 
13604  2758 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
13605  2759 2686 ... 409 }
13606  2760 2687 ... 410 
13607  2761 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13608  2762 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
13609  2763 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
13610  2764 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
13611  2765 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
13612  2766 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
13613  2767 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
13614  2768 2695 ... 418                 *term,
13615  2769 2696 ... 419                 "the"
13616  2770 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
13617  2771 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
13618  2772 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
13619  2773 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
13620  2774 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
13621  2775 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
13622  2776 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
13623  2777 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
13624  2778 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
13625  2779 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
13626  2780 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
13627  2781 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
13628  2782 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
13629  2783 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
13630  2784 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
13631  2785 2712 ... 435             )
13632  2786 2713 ... 436         })
13633  2787 2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
13634  2788 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
13635  2789 2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
13636  2790 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
13637  2791 2718 ... 441     terms
13638  2792 2719 ... 442 }

13958  3112 3039 .... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {
13959  3113 3040 .... 1593     format!(
13960  3114 3041 .... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
13961  3115 3042 .... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
13962  3116 3043 .... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
13963  3117 3044 .... 1597 \n\
13964  3118 3045 .... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
13965  3119 3046 .... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
13966  3120 3047 .... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
13967  3121 3048 .... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
13968  3122 3049 .... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\

14100  3254 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {

14102  3256 3183 .... 1998         .budget
14103  3257 3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
14104  3258 3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());

14106  3260 3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",

14115  3269 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {

14140  3294 3221 .... 2036

14199  3353 3280 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
14200  3354 3281 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
14201  3355 3282 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
14202  3356 3283 .... 2299             query,
14203  3357 3284 .... 2300             intent,
14204  3358 3285 .... 2301             rationale,
14205  3359 3286 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {

14207  3361 3288 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
14208  3362 3289 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
14209  3363 3290 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
14210  3364 3291 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
14211  3365 3292 .... 2308                 }),

14220  3374 3301 .... 2317         },
14221  3375 3302 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {

14226  3380 3307 .... 2323         },
14227  3381 3308 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
14228  3382 3309 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
14229  3383 3310 .... 2326                 .as_deref()

14232  3386 3313 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
14233  3387 3314 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
14234  3388 3315 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {

14239  3393 3320 .... 2336             }

17161  6315 2662 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
17162  6316 2663 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
17163  6317 2664 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
17164  6318 2665 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
17165  6319 2666 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
17166  6320 2667 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
17167  6321 2668 2570 ... 287             break;
17168  6322 2669 2571 ... 288         };
17169  6323 2670 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
17170  6324 2671 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
17171  6325 2672 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
17172  6326 2673 2575 ... 292         }
17173  6327 2674 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
17174  6328 2675 2577 ... 294     }
17175  6329 2676 2578 ... 295     targets
17176  6330 2677 2579 ... 296 }

17178  6332 2679 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
17179  6333 2680 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
17180  6334 2681 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
17181  6335 2682 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
17182  6336 2683 2585 ... 302 
17183  6337 2684 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
17184  6338 2685 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
17185  6339 2686 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
17186  6340 2687 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
17187  6341 2688 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
17188  6342 2689 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
17189  6343 2690 2592 ... 309                 }
17190  6344 2691 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
17191  6345 2692 2594 ... 311             }
17192  6346 2693 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
17193  6347 2694 2596 ... 313             continue;
17194  6348 2695 2597 ... 314         }
17195  6349 2696 2598 ... 315 
17196  6350 2697 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
17197  6351 2698 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
17198  6352 2699 2601 ... 318         }
17199  6353 2700 2602 ... 319     }
17200  6354 2701 2603 ... 320 
17201  6355 2702 2604 ... 321     targets
17202  6356 2703 2605 ... 322 }

17208  6362 2709 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
17209  6363 2710 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
17210  6364 2711 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
17211  6365 2712 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
17212  6366 2713 2615 ... 332     {
17213  6367 2714 2616 ... 333         return None;
17214  6368 2715 2617 ... 334     }
17215  6369 2716 2618 ... 335 
17216  6370 2717 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
17217  6371 2718 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
17218  6372 2719 2621 ... 338         return None;
17219  6373 2720 2622 ... 339     }
17220  6374 2721 2623 ... 340 
17221  6375 2722 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
17222  6376 2723 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
17223  6377 2724 2626 ... 343     } else {

17225  6379 2726 2628 ... 345     };
17226  6380 2727 2629 ... 346

17228  6382 2729 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
17229  6383 2730 2632 ... 349     } else {
17230  6384 2731 2633 ... 350         None
17231  6385 2732 2634 ... 351     }
17232  6386 2733 2635 ... 352 }

17248  6402 2749 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
17249  6403 2750 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
17250  6404 2751 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
17251  6405 2752 2654 ... 377 
17252  6406 2753 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
17253  6407 2754 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
17254  6408 2755 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
17255  6409 2756 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
17256  6410 2757 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
17257  6411 2758 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
17258  6412 2759 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
17259  6413 2760 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
17260  6414 2761 2663 ... 386                 .count();
17261  6415 2762 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
17262  6416 2763 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
17263  6417 2764 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
17264  6418 2765 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
17265  6419 2766 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
17266  6420 2767 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
17267  6421 2768 2670 ... 393                     break;
17268  6422 2769 2671 ... 394                 }
17269  6423 2770 2672 ... 395             }
17270  6424 2771 2673 ... 396         }
17271  6425 2772 2674 ... 397     }
17272  6426 2773 2675 ... 398 
17273  6427 2774 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
17274  6428 2775 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
17275  6429 2776 2678 ... 401             lines
17276  6430 2777 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
17277  6431 2778 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
17278  6432 2779 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
17279  6433 2780 2682 ... 405         );
17280  6434 2781 2683 ... 406     }
17281  6435 2782 2684 ... 407 
17282  6436 2783 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
17283  6437 2784 2686 ... 409 }

17285  6439 2786 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
17286  6440 2787 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
17287  6441 2788 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()

17289  6443 2790 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
17290  6444 2791 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
17291  6445 2792 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
17292  6446 2793 2695 ... 418                 *term,
17293  6447 2794 2696 ... 419                 "the"
17294  6448 2795 2697 ... 420                     | "and"

17296  6450 2797 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
17297  6451 2798 2700 ... 423                     | "into"

17299  6453 2800 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
17300  6454 2801 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
17301  6455 2802 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
17302  6456 2803 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
17303  6457 2804 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
17304  6458 2805 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
17305  6459 2806 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
17306  6460 2807 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
17307  6461 2808 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
17308  6462 2809 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
17309  6463 2810 2712 ... 435             )
17310  6464 2811 2713 ... 436         })

17312  6466 2813 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();

17314  6468 2815 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
17315  6469 2816 2718 ... 441     terms
17316  6470 2817 2719 ... 442 }

17636  6790 3137 3039 .... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {
17637  6791 3138 3040 .... 1593     format!(
17638  6792 3139 3041 .... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
17639  6793 3140 3042 .... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
17640  6794 3141 3043 .... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
17641  6795 3142 3044 .... 1597 \n\
17642  6796 3143 3045 .... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
17643  6797 3144 3046 .... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17644  6798 3145 3047 .... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17645  6799 3146 3048 .... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17646  6800 3147 3049 .... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17647  6801 3148 3050 .... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17648  6802 3149 3051 .... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17649  6803 3150 3052 .... 1605 \n\
17650  6804 3151 3053 .... 1606 Rules:\n\
17651  6805 3152 3054 .... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
17652  6806 3153 3055 .... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
17653  6807 3154 3056 .... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
17654  6808 3155 3057 .... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
17655  6809 3156 3058 .... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
17656  6810 3157 3059 .... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
17657  6811 3158 3060 .... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\
17658  6812 3159 3061 .... 1614 - Inspect commands must stay read-only.\n\
17659  6813 3160 3062 .... 1615 \n\
17660  6814 3161 3063 .... 1616 Workspace root:\n\
17661  6815 3162 3064 .... 1617 {}\n\
17662  6816 3163 3065 .... 1618 \n\
17663  6817 3164 3066 .... 1619 Interpretation context:\n\
17664  6818 3165 3067 .... 1620 {}\n\
17665  6819 3166 3068 .... 1621 \n\
17666  6820 3167 3069 .... 1622 Recent turns:\n\
17667  6821 3168 3070 .... 1623 {}\n\
17668  6822 3169 3071 .... 1624 \n\
17669  6823 3170 3072 .... 1625 Current loop state:\n\
17670  6824 3171 3073 .... 1626 {}\n\
17671  6825 3172 3074 .... 1627 \n\
17672  6826 3173 3075 .... 1628 Current user request:\n\
17673  6827 3174 3076 .... 1629 {}\n",
17674  6828 3175 3077 .... 1630         prompt.workspace_root.display(),
17675  6829 3176 3078 .... 1631         format_interpretation_context_digest(prompt.interpretation),
17676  6830 3177 3079 .... 1632         format_recent_turn_list(&prompt.request.recent_turns),
17677  6831 3178 3080 .... 1633         format_planner_loop_state_digest(prompt.request),
17678  6832 3179 3081 .... 1634         prompt.user_prompt,
17679  6833 3180 3082 .... 1635     )
17680  6834 3181 3083 .... 1636 }

17682  6836 3183 3085 .... 1638 fn build_planner_retry_prompt(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
17683  6837 3184 3086 .... 1639     format!(
17684  6838 3185 3087 .... 1640         "Your last planner reply was empty or invalid.\n\
17685  6839 3186 3088 .... 1641 Return ONLY one valid JSON planner action.\n\
17686  6840 3187 3089 .... 1642 \n\
17687  6841 3188 3090 .... 1643 Allowed actions:\n\
17688  6842 3189 3091 .... 1644 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17689  6843 3190 3092 .... 1645 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17690  6844 3191 3093 .... 1646 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17691  6845 3192 3094 .... 1647 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17692  6846 3193 3095 .... 1648 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17693  6847 3194 3096 .... 1649 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
17694  6848 3195 3097 .... 1650 \n\
17695  6849 3196 3098 .... 1651 Do not answer the user directly.\n\
17696  6850 3197 3099 .... 1652 \n\
17697  6851 3198 3100 .... 1653 Interpretation context:\n\
17698  6852 3199 3101 .... 1654 {}\n\

19350  8504 4851 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
19351  8505 4852 ...  571         &self,
19352  8506 4853 ...  572         prompt: &str,
19353  8507 4854 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
19354  8508 4855 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
19355  8509 4856 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
19356  8510 4857 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
19357  8511 4858 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
19358  8512 4859 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
19359  8513 4860 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
19360  8514 4861 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
19361  8515 4862 ...  581             .prepared
19362  8516 4863 ...  582             .gatherer
19363  8517 4864 ...  583             .as_ref()
19364  8518 4865 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
19365  8519 4866 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
19366  8520 4867 ...  586 
19367  8521 4868 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
19368  8522 4869 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
19369  8523 4870 ...  589                 prompt,
19370  8524 4871 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
19371  8525 4872 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
19372  8526 4873 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
19373  8527 4874 ...  593             )
19374  8528 4875 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
19375  8529 4876 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
19376  8530 4877 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
19377  8531 4878 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
19378  8532 4879 ...  598                 sequence,
19379  8533 4880 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
19380  8534 4881 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
19381  8535 4882 ...  601             });
19382  8536 4883 ...  602 
19383  8537 4884 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
19384  8538 4885 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
19385  8539 4886 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
19386  8540 4887 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
19387  8541 4888 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
19388  8542 4889 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
19389  8543 4890 ...  609                         });
19390  8544 4891 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
19391  8545 4892 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
19392  8546 4893 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
19393  8547 4894 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
19394  8548 4895 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
19395  8549 4896 ...  615                                     intent
19396  8550 4897 ...  616                                         .clone()
19397  8551 4898 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
19398  8552 4899 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
19399  8553 4900 ...  619                                 )
19400  8554 4901 ...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
19401  8555 4902 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
19402  8556 4903 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
19403  8557 4904 ...  623                                         &context.interpretation,

19405  8559 4906 ...  625                                         &loop_state,
19406  8560 4907 ...  626                                     ),
19407  8561 4908 ...  627                                 );
19408  8562 4909 ...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
19409  8563 4910 ...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
19410  8564 4911 ...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
19411  8565 4912 ...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {

19442  8596 4943 ...  662                                     }
19443  8597 4944 ...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
19444  8598 4945 ...  664                                 }
19445  8599 4946 ...  665                             }
19446  8600 4947 ...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
