19448  8602 4949 ...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
19449  8603 4950 ...  669                             }
19450  8604 4951 ...  670                         }
19451  8605 4952 ...  671                     } else {
19452  8606 4953 ...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
19453  8607 4954 ...  673                     }
19454  8608 4955 ...  674                 }
19455  8609 4956 ...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
19456  8610 4957 ...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
19457  8611 4958 ...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());

19468  8622 4969 ...  688                             },

19470  8624 4971 ...  690                         );
19471  8625 4972 ...  691                         used_workspace_resources = true;
19472  8626 4973 ...  692                         format!("read {source}")
19473  8627 4974 ...  693                     }
19474  8628 4975 ...  694                 }
19475  8629 4976 ...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
19476  8630 4977 ...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
19477  8631 4978 ...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());

19479  8633 4980 ...  699                     } else {

20600  9754 6101 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
20601  9755 6102 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
20602  9756 6103 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
20603  9757 6104 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
20604  9758 6105 ... 267         .into_iter()
20605  9759 6106 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
20606  9760 6107 ... 269     {
20607  9761 6108 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
20608  9762 6109 ... 271             continue;
20609  9763 6110 ... 272         };
20610  9764 6111 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
20611  9765 6112 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
20612  9766 6113 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
20613  9767 6114 ... 276         }
20614  9768 6115 ... 277     }
20615  9769 6116 ... 278     ordered
20616  9770 6117 ... 279 }
20617  9771 6118 ... 280 
20618  9772 6119 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
20619  9773 6120 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
20620  9774 6121 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
20621  9775 6122 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
20622  9776 6123 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
20623  9777 6124 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
20624  9778 6125 ... 287             break;
20625  9779 6126 ... 288         };
20626  9780 6127 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
20627  9781 6128 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
20628  9782 6129 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
20629  9783 6130 ... 292         }
20630  9784 6131 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
20631  9785 6132 ... 294     }
20632  9786 6133 ... 295     targets
20633  9787 6134 ... 296 }
20634  9788 6135 ... 297 
20635  9789 6136 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
20636  9790 6137 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
20637  9791 6138 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
20638  9792 6139 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
20639  9793 6140 ... 302 
20640  9794 6141 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
20641  9795 6142 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
20642  9796 6143 ... 305             if in_tick {
20643  9797 6144 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
20644  9798 6145 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
20645  9799 6146 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
20646  9800 6147 ... 309                 }
20647  9801 6148 ... 310                 current.clear();
20648  9802 6149 ... 311             }
20649  9803 6150 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
20650  9804 6151 ... 313             continue;
20651  9805 6152 ... 314         }
20652  9806 6153 ... 315 
20653  9807 6154 ... 316         if in_tick {
20654  9808 6155 ... 317             current.push(ch);
20655  9809 6156 ... 318         }
20656  9810 6157 ... 319     }
20657  9811 6158 ... 320 
20658  9812 6159 ... 321     targets
20659  9813 6160 ... 322 }
20660  9814 6161 ... 323 
20661  9815 6162 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
20662  9816 6163 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
20663  9817 6164 ... 326 }
20664  9818 6165 ... 327 
20665  9819 6166 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
20666  9820 6167 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
20667  9821 6168 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
20668  9822 6169 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
20669  9823 6170 ... 332     {
20670  9824 6171 ... 333         return None;
20671  9825 6172 ... 334     }
20672  9826 6173 ... 335 
20673  9827 6174 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
20674  9828 6175 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
20675  9829 6176 ... 338         return None;
20676  9830 6177 ... 339     }
20677  9831 6178 ... 340 
20678  9832 6179 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
20679  9833 6180 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
20680  9834 6181 ... 343     } else {
20681  9835 6182 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
20682  9836 6183 ... 345     };
20683  9837 6184 ... 346 
20684  9838 6185 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
20685  9839 6186 ... 348         Some(candidate)
20686  9840 6187 ... 349     } else {
20687  9841 6188 ... 350         None
20688  9842 6189 ... 351     }
20689  9843 6190 ... 352 }

20705  9859 6206 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
20706  9860 6207 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
20707  9861 6208 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
20708  9862 6209 ... 377 
20709  9863 6210 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
20710  9864 6211 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
20711  9865 6212 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
20712  9866 6213 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
20713  9867 6214 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
20714  9868 6215 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
20715  9869 6216 ... 384                 .iter()
20716  9870 6217 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
20717  9871 6218 ... 386                 .count();
20718  9872 6219 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
20719  9873 6220 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
20720  9874 6221 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
20721  9875 6222 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
20722  9876 6223 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
20723  9877 6224 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
20724  9878 6225 ... 393                     break;
20725  9879 6226 ... 394                 }
20726  9880 6227 ... 395             }
20727  9881 6228 ... 396         }
20728  9882 6229 ... 397     }
20729  9883 6230 ... 398 
20730  9884 6231 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
20731  9885 6232 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
20732  9886 6233 ... 401             lines
20733  9887 6234 ... 402                 .into_iter()
20734  9888 6235 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
20735  9889 6236 ... 404                 .take(8),
20736  9890 6237 ... 405         );
20737  9891 6238 ... 406     }
20738  9892 6239 ... 407 
20739  9893 6240 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
20740  9894 6241 ... 409 }
20741  9895 6242 ... 410 
20742  9896 6243 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
20743  9897 6244 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
20744  9898 6245 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
20745  9899 6246 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
20746  9900 6247 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
20747  9901 6248 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
20748  9902 6249 ... 417             !matches!(
20749  9903 6250 ... 418                 *term,
20750  9904 6251 ... 419                 "the"
20751  9905 6252 ... 420                     | "and"
20752  9906 6253 ... 421                     | "with"
20753  9907 6254 ... 422                     | "from"
20754  9908 6255 ... 423                     | "into"
20755  9909 6256 ... 424                     | "that"
20756  9910 6257 ... 425                     | "this"
20757  9911 6258 ... 426                     | "what"
20758  9912 6259 ... 427                     | "when"
20759  9913 6260 ... 428                     | "where"
20760  9914 6261 ... 429                     | "which"
20761  9915 6262 ... 430                     | "would"
20762  9916 6263 ... 431                     | "could"
20763  9917 6264 ... 432                     | "should"
20764  9918 6265 ... 433                     | "about"
20765  9919 6266 ... 434                     | "your"
20766  9920 6267 ... 435             )
20767  9921 6268 ... 436         })
20768  9922 6269 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
20769  9923 6270 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20770  9924 6271 ... 439     terms.sort();
20771  9925 6272 ... 440     terms.dedup();
20772  9926 6273 ... 441     terms
20773  9927 6274 ... 442 }

21235 10389 6736 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {

21237 10391 6738 .... 1998         .budget
21238 10392 6739 .... 1999         .max_steps

21240 10394 6741 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(

21246 10400 6747 .... 2007

21250 10404 6751 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
21251 10405 6752 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(

21269 10423 6770 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",

21271 10425 6772 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
21272 10426 6773 .... 2033             ));
21273 10427 6774 .... 2034         }

21275 10429 6776 .... 2036

21277 10431 6778 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());

21332 10486 6833 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
21333 10487 6834 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
21334 10488 6835 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
21335 10489 6836 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
21336 10490 6837 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
21337 10491 6838 .... 2299             query,
21338 10492 6839 .... 2300             intent,
21339 10493 6840 .... 2301             rationale,
21340 10494 6841 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
21341 10495 6842 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
21342 10496 6843 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
21343 10497 6844 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
21344 10498 6845 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
21345 10499 6846 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
21346 10500 6847 .... 2308                 }),
21347 10501 6848 .... 2309             },
21348 10502 6849 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
21349 10503 6850 .... 2311         },
21350 10504 6851 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
21351 10505 6852 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
21352 10506 6853 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
21353 10507 6854 .... 2315             },
21354 10508 6855 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
21355 10509 6856 .... 2317         },
21356 10510 6857 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
21357 10511 6858 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
21358 10512 6859 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
21359 10513 6860 .... 2321             },
21360 10514 6861 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
21361 10515 6862 .... 2323         },
21362 10516 6863 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
21363 10517 6864 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
21364 10518 6865 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
21365 10519 6866 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
21366 10520 6867 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
21367 10521 6868 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
21368 10522 6869 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
21369 10523 6870 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
21370 10524 6871 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
21371 10525 6872 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
21372 10526 6873 .... 2334                 },
21373 10527 6874 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
21374 10528 6875 .... 2336             }
21375 10529 6876 .... 2337         }
21376 10530 6877 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
21377 10531 6878 .... 2339             branches,
21378 10532 6879 .... 2340             rationale,
21379 10533 6880 .... 2341         } => {
21380 10534 6881 .... 2342             let branches = branches
21381 10535 6882 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

21383 10537 6884 .... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
21384 10538 6885 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();

21386 10540 6887 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
21387 10541 6888 .... 2349             }
21388 10542 6889 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
21389 10543 6890 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
21390 10544 6891 .... 2352                     branches,
21391 10545 6892 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
21392 10546 6893 .... 2354                 },
21393 10547 6894 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
21394 10548 6895 .... 2356             }
21395 10549 6896 .... 2357         }
21396 10550 6897 .... 2358         PlannerActionEnvelope::Stop { reason, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
21397 10551 6898 .... 2359             action: PlannerAction::Stop {
21398 10552 6899 .... 2360                 reason: required_planner_field("reason", reason)?,
21399 10553 6900 .... 2361             },
21400 10554 6901 .... 2362             rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "stop planning".to_string()),
21401 10555 6902 .... 2363         },

21405 10559 6906 .... 2367 }

21415 10569 6916 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
21416 10570 6917 .... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {

21421 10575 6922 .... 2383             },
21422 10576 6923 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
21423 10577 6924 .... 2385         };
21424 10578 6925 .... 2386     }
21425 10579 6926 .... 2387 
21426 10580 6927 .... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
21427 10581 6928 .... 2389         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
21428 10582 6929 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {

21430 10584 6931 .... 2392                 intent: Some("initial planner fallback".to_string()),
21431 10585 6932 .... 2393             },
21432 10586 6933 .... 2394             rationale: "start with a bounded workspace search when the planner reply is invalid"

21436 10590 6937 .... 2398

21439 10593 6940 .... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
21440 10594 6941 .... 2402         },

24029 13183 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
24030 13184 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
24031 13185 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
24032 13186 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
24033 13187 ... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
24034 13188 ... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
24035 13189 ... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
24036 13190 ... 191         return Ok(None);
24037 13191 ... 192     }
24038 13192 ... 193

24061 13215 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
24062 13216 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
24063 13217 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
24064 13218 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
24065 13219 ... 267         .into_iter()
24066 13220 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
24067 13221 ... 269     {
24068 13222 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
24069 13223 ... 271             continue;
24070 13224 ... 272         };
24071 13225 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
24072 13226 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
24073 13227 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
24074 13228 ... 276         }
24075 13229 ... 277     }
24076 13230 ... 278     ordered
24077 13231 ... 279 }
24078 13232 ... 280 
24079 13233 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
24080 13234 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
24081 13235 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
24082 13236 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
24083 13237 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
24084 13238 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
24085 13239 ... 287             break;
24086 13240 ... 288         };
24087 13241 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
24088 13242 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
24089 13243 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
24090 13244 ... 292         }
24091 13245 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
24092 13246 ... 294     }
24093 13247 ... 295     targets
24094 13248 ... 296 }
24095 13249 ... 297 
24096 13250 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
24097 13251 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
24098 13252 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
24099 13253 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
24100 13254 ... 302 
24101 13255 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
24102 13256 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
24103 13257 ... 305             if in_tick {
24104 13258 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
24105 13259 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
24106 13260 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
24107 13261 ... 309                 }
24108 13262 ... 310                 current.clear();
24109 13263 ... 311             }
24110 13264 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
24111 13265 ... 313             continue;
24112 13266 ... 314         }
24113 13267 ... 315 
24114 13268 ... 316         if in_tick {
24115 13269 ... 317             current.push(ch);
24116 13270 ... 318         }
24117 13271 ... 319     }
24118 13272 ... 320 
24119 13273 ... 321     targets
24120 13274 ... 322 }
24121 13275 ... 323 
24122 13276 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
24123 13277 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
24124 13278 ... 326 }
24125 13279 ... 327 
24126 13280 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
24127 13281 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
24128 13282 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
24129 13283 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
24130 13284 ... 332     {
24131 13285 ... 333         return None;
24132 13286 ... 334     }
24133 13287 ... 335 
24134 13288 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
24135 13289 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
24136 13290 ... 338         return None;
24137 13291 ... 339     }
24138 13292 ... 340 
24139 13293 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
24140 13294 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
24141 13295 ... 343     } else {
24142 13296 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
24143 13297 ... 345     };
24144 13298 ... 346 
24145 13299 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
24146 13300 ... 348         Some(candidate)
24147 13301 ... 349     } else {
24148 13302 ... 350         None
24149 13303 ... 351     }
24150 13304 ... 352 }
24151 13305 159 353 
24152 13306 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
24153 13307 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
24154 13308 
24155 13309 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
24156 13310 170 364     trimmed
24157 13311 171 365 }
24158 13312 ... 366 
24159 13313 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
24160 13314 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
24161 13315 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
24162 13316 ... 370         .display()
24163 13317 ... 371         .to_string()
24164 13318 ... 372 }

24166 13320 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
24167 13321 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
24168 13322 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
24169 13323 ... 377 
24170 13324 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
24171 13325 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
24172 13326 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
24173 13327 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
24174 13328 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
24175 13329 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
24176 13330 ... 384                 .iter()
24177 13331 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
24178 13332 ... 386                 .count();
24179 13333 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
24180 13334 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
24181 13335 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
24182 13336 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
24183 13337 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
24184 13338 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
24185 13339 ... 393                     break;
24186 13340 ... 394                 }
24187 13341 ... 395             }
24188 13342 ... 396         }
24189 13343 ... 397     }
24190 13344 ... 398 
24191 13345 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
24192 13346 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
24193 13347 ... 401             lines
24194 13348 ... 402                 .into_iter()
24195 13349 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
24196 13350 ... 404                 .take(8),
24197 13351 ... 405         );
24198 13352 ... 406     }
24199 13353 ... 407 
24200 13354 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
24201 13355 ... 409 }
24202 13356 ... 410 
24203 13357 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
24204 13358 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
24205 13359 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
24206 13360 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
24207 13361 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
24208 13362 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
24209 13363 ... 417             !matches!(
24210 13364 ... 418                 *term,
24211 13365 ... 419                 "the"
24212 13366 ... 420                     | "and"
24213 13367 ... 421                     | "with"
24214 13368 ... 422                     | "from"
24215 13369 ... 423                     | "into"
24216 13370 ... 424                     | "that"
24217 13371 ... 425                     | "this"
24218 13372 ... 426                     | "what"
24219 13373 ... 427                     | "when"
24220 13374 ... 428                     | "where"
24221 13375 ... 429                     | "which"
24222 13376 ... 430                     | "would"
24223 13377 ... 431                     | "could"
24224 13378 ... 432                     | "should"
24225 13379 ... 433                     | "about"
24226 13380 ... 434                     | "your"
24227 13381 ... 435             )
24228 13382 ... 436         })
24229 13383 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
24230 13384 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
24231 13385 ... 439     terms.sort();
24232 13386 ... 440     terms.dedup();
24233 13387 ... 441     terms
24234 13388 ... 442 }

24696 13850 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
24697 13851 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
24698 13852 .... 1998         .budget
24699 13853 .... 1999         .max_steps
24700 13854 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
24701 13855 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
24702 13856 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
24703 13857 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
24704 13858 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
24705 13859 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
24706 13860 .... 2006     )];
24707 13861 .... 2007 
24708 13862 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
24709 13863 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
24710 13864 .... 2010     } else {
24711 13865 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
24712 13866 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
24713 13867 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
24714 13868 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
24715 13869 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
24716 13870 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
24717 13871 .... 2017             ));
24718 13872 .... 2018         }
24719 13873 .... 2019     }
24720 13874 .... 2020 
24721 13875 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
24722 13876 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
24723 13877 .... 2023         for item in request
24724 13878 .... 2024             .loop_state
24725 13879 .... 2025             .evidence_items
24726 13880 .... 2026             .iter()
24727 13881 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
24728 13882 .... 2028         {
24729 13883 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
24730 13884 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
24731 13885 .... 2031                 item.source,
24732 13886 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
24733 13887 .... 2033             ));
24734 13888 .... 2034         }
24735 13889 .... 2035     }
24736 13890 .... 2036 
24737 13891 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
24738 13892 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
24739 13893 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
24740 13894 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
24741 13895 .... 2041         }
24742 13896 .... 2042     }
24743 13897 .... 2043 
24744 13898 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
24745 13899 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
24746 13900 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
24747 13901 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
24748 13902 .... 2048         ));
24749 13903 .... 2049     }
24750 13904 .... 2050 
24751 13905 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
24752 13906 .... 2052 }

24793 13947 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
24794 13948 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
24795 13949 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
24796 13950 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
24797 13951 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
24798 13952 .... 2299             query,
24799 13953 .... 2300             intent,
24800 13954 .... 2301             rationale,
24801 13955 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
24802 13956 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
24803 13957 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
24804 13958 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
24805 13959 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
24806 13960 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
24807 13961 .... 2308                 }),
24808 13962 .... 2309             },
24809 13963 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
24810 13964 .... 2311         },
24811 13965 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
24812 13966 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
24813 13967 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
24814 13968 .... 2315             },
24815 13969 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
24816 13970 .... 2317         },
24817 13971 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
24818 13972 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
24819 13973 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
24820 13974 .... 2321             },
24821 13975 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
24822 13976 .... 2323         },
24823 13977 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
24824 13978 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
24825 13979 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
24826 13980 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
24827 13981 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
24828 13982 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
24829 13983 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
24830 13984 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
24831 13985 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
24832 13986 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
24833 13987 .... 2334                 },
24834 13988 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
24835 13989 .... 2336             }
24836 13990 .... 2337         }
24837 13991 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
24838 13992 .... 2339             branches,
24839 13993 .... 2340             rationale,
24840 13994 .... 2341         } => {
24841 13995 .... 2342             let branches = branches
24842 13996 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

24844 13998 .... 2345                 .filter(|branch| !branch.is_empty())
24845 13999 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
24846 14000 .... 2347             if branches.is_empty() {
24847 14001 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
24848 14002 .... 2349             }
24849 14003 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
24850 14004 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
24851 14005 .... 2352                     branches,
24852 14006 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
24853 14007 .... 2354                 },
24854 14008 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
24855 14009 .... 2356             }

24862 14016 .... 2363         },

24876 14030 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
24877 14031 .... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {
24878 14032 .... 2379         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
24879 14033 .... 2380             action: PlannerAction::Search {
24880 14034 .... 2381                 query: branch.clone(),

24882 14036 .... 2383             },
24883 14037 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
24884 14038 .... 2385         };
24885 14039 .... 2386     }
24886 14040 .... 2387 
24887 14041 .... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {

24889 14043 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {

24892 14046 .... 2393             },

24899 14053 .... 2400         action: PlannerAction::Stop {
24900 14054 .... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
24901 14055 .... 2402         },
24902 14056 .... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"
24903 14057 .... 2404             .to_string(),
24904 14058 .... 2405     }

26238 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
26239 ...  571         &self,
26240 ...  572         prompt: &str,
26241 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
26242 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
26243 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
26244 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
26245 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
26246 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
26247 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
26248 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
26249 ...  581             .prepared
26250 ...  582             .gatherer
26251 ...  583             .as_ref()
26252 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
26253 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
26254 ...  586 
26255 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
26256 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
26257 ...  589                 prompt,
26258 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
26259 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
26260 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
26261 ...  593             )
26262 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
26263 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
26264 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
26265 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
26266 ...  598                 sequence,
26267 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
26268 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
26269 ...  601             });
26270 ...  602 
26271 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
26272 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
26273 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
26274 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
26275 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
26276 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
26277 ...  609                         });
26278 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
26279 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
26280 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
26281 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
26282 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
26283 ...  615                                     intent
26284 ...  616                                         .clone()
26285 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
26286 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
26287 ...  619                                 )
26288 ...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
26289 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
26290 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
26291 ...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
26292 ...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
26293 ...  625                                         &loop_state,
26294 ...  626                                     ),
26295 ...  627                                 );
26296 ...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
26297 ...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
26298 ...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
26299 ...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
26300 ...  632                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
26301 ...  633                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
26302 ...  634                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
26303 ...  635                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
26304 ...  636                                                     &self.workspace_root,
26305 ...  637                                                     bundle,
26306 ...  638                                                 ),
26307 ...  639                                             });
26308 ...  640                                             if let Some(planner) = bundle.planner.as_ref() {
26309 ...  641                                                 event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
26310 ...  642                                                     strategy: format_planner_strategy(
26311 ...  643                                                         &planner.strategy,
26312 ...  644                                                     )
26313 ...  645                                                     .to_string(),
26314 ...  646                                                     turns: planner.turn_count,
26315 ...  647                                                     steps: planner.steps.len(),
26316 ...  648                                                     stop_reason: planner.stop_reason.clone(),
26317 ...  649                                                 });
26318 ...  650                                             }
26319 ...  651                                             merge_evidence_items(
26320 ...  652                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
26321 ...  653                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
26322 ...  654                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
26323 ...  655                                             );
26324 ...  656                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
26325 ...  657                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
26326 ...  658                                             bundle.summary.clone()
26327 ...  659                                         } else {
26328 ...  660                                             "planner search returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
26329 ...  661                                         }
26330 ...  662                                     }
26331 ...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
26332 ...  664                                 }
26333 ...  665                             }
26334 ...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
26335 ...  667                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
26336 ...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
26337 ...  669                             }
26338 ...  670                         }
26339 ...  671                     } else {
26340 ...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
26341 ...  673                     }
26342 ...  674                 }
26343 ...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
26344 ...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
26345 ...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());
26346 ...  678                         "planner read budget exhausted".to_string()

26352 ...  684                                 source: source.clone(),

26355 ...  687                                 rank: 0,
26356 ...  688                             },
26357 ...  689                             budget.max_evidence_items,
26358 ...  690                         );
26359 ...  691                         used_workspace_resources = true;
26360 ...  692                         format!("read {source}")
26361 ...  693                     }
26362 ...  694                 }
26363 ...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
26364 ...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
26365 ...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());

26374 ...  706                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
26375 ...  707                                 rank: 0,
26376 ...  708                             },

26378 ...  710                         );
26379 ...  711                         used_workspace_resources = true;
26380 ...  712                         format!("inspected {command}")
26381 ...  713                     }
26382 ...  714                 }
26383 ...  715                 PlannerAction::Refine { query, .. } => {
26384 ...  716                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
26385 ...  717                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
26386 ...  718                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
26387 ...  719                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
26388 ...  720                         });

26398 ...  730                                 .with_prior_context(

26400 ...  732                                         &context.interpretation,
26401 ...  733                                         &context.recent_turns,
26402 ...  734                                         &loop_state,
26403 ...  735                                     ),
26404 ...  736                                 );

26406 ...  738                                     Ok(result) => {

26408 ...  740                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {

26414 ...  746                                                     bundle,

26419 ...  751                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
26420 ...  752                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
26421 ...  753                                             );
26422 ...  754                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
26423 ...  755                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
26424 ...  756                                             format!("refined search toward `{query}`")
26425 ...  757                                         } else {
26426 ...  758                                             "planner refine returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
26427 ...  759                                         }

26442 ...  774                     for branch in branches.iter().take(budget.max_branch_factor) {
26443 ...  775                         if !loop_state.pending_branches.contains(branch) {
26444 ...  776                             loop_state.pending_branches.push(branch.clone());
26445 ...  777                         }

26463 ...  795

26465 ...  797                 break;

26469 ...  801                 break;

27456 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
27457 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
27458 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
27459 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {

27463 ... 191         return Ok(None);
27464 ... 192     }
27465 ... 193 
27466 ... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
27467 ... 195         path,
27468 ... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
27469 ... 197         kind,
27470 ... 198     }))

27488 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
27489 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
27490 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
27491 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
27492 ... 267         .into_iter()
27493 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
27494 ... 269     {
27495 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
27496 ... 271             continue;
27497 ... 272         };
27498 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
27499 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
27500 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
27501 ... 276         }
27502 ... 277     }
27503 ... 278     ordered
27504 ... 279 }
27505 ... 280 
27506 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
27507 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
27508 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
27509 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
27510 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
27511 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
27512 ... 287             break;
27513 ... 288         };
27514 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
27515 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
27516 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
27517 ... 292         }
27518 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
27519 ... 294     }
27520 ... 295     targets
27521 ... 296 }
27522 ... 297 
27523 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
27524 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
27525 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
27526 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
27527 ... 302 
27528 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
27529 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
27530 ... 305             if in_tick {
27531 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
27532 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
27533 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
27534 ... 309                 }
27535 ... 310                 current.clear();
27536 ... 311             }
27537 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
27538 ... 313             continue;
27539 ... 314         }
27540 ... 315 
27541 ... 316         if in_tick {
27542 ... 317             current.push(ch);
27543 ... 318         }
27544 ... 319     }
27545 ... 320 
27546 ... 321     targets
27547 ... 322 }
27548 ... 323 
27549 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
27550 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
27551 ... 326 }
27552 ... 327 
27553 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
27554 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
27555 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
27556 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
27557 ... 332     {
27558 ... 333         return None;
27559 ... 334     }
27560 ... 335 
27561 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
27562 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
27563 ... 338         return None;
27564 ... 339     }
27565 ... 340 
27566 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
27567 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
27568 ... 343     } else {
27569 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
27570 ... 345     };
27571 ... 346 
27572 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
27573 ... 348         Some(candidate)
27574 ... 349     } else {
27575 ... 350         None
27576 ... 351     }
27577 ... 352 }
27578 159 353 
27579 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
27580 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
27581 
27582 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
27583 170 364     trimmed
27584 171 365 }
27585 ... 366 
27586 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
27587 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
27588 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
27589 ... 370         .display()
27590 ... 371         .to_string()
27591 ... 372 }
27592 ... 373 
27593 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
27594 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
27595 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
27596 ... 377 
27597 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
27598 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
27599 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
27600 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
27601 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
27602 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
27603 ... 384                 .iter()
27604 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
27605 ... 386                 .count();
27606 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
27607 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
27608 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
27609 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
27610 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
27611 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
27612 ... 393                     break;
27613 ... 394                 }
27614 ... 395             }
27615 ... 396         }
27616 ... 397     }
27617 ... 398 
27618 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
27619 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
27620 ... 401             lines
27621 ... 402                 .into_iter()
27622 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
27623 ... 404                 .take(8),
27624 ... 405         );
27625 ... 406     }
27626 ... 407 
27627 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
27628 ... 409 }
27629 ... 410 
27630 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
27631 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
27632 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
27633 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
27634 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
27635 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
27636 ... 417             !matches!(
27637 ... 418                 *term,
27638 ... 419                 "the"
27639 ... 420                     | "and"
27640 ... 421                     | "with"
27641 ... 422                     | "from"
27642 ... 423                     | "into"
27643 ... 424                     | "that"
27644 ... 425                     | "this"
27645 ... 426                     | "what"
27646 ... 427                     | "when"
27647 ... 428                     | "where"
27648 ... 429                     | "which"
27649 ... 430                     | "would"
27650 ... 431                     | "could"
27651 ... 432                     | "should"
27652 ... 433                     | "about"
27653 ... 434                     | "your"
27654 ... 435             )
27655 ... 436         })
27656 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
27657 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
27658 ... 439     terms.sort();
27659 ... 440     terms.dedup();
27660 ... 441     terms
27661 ... 442 }

28123 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
28124 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
28125 .... 1998         .budget
28126 .... 1999         .max_steps
28127 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
28128 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
28129 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
28130 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
28131 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
28132 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
28133 .... 2006     )];
28134 .... 2007 
28135 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
28136 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
28137 .... 2010     } else {
28138 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
28139 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
28140 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
28141 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
28142 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
28143 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
28144 .... 2017             ));
28145 .... 2018         }
28146 .... 2019     }
28147 .... 2020 
28148 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
28149 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
28150 .... 2023         for item in request
28151 .... 2024             .loop_state
28152 .... 2025             .evidence_items
28153 .... 2026             .iter()
28154 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
28155 .... 2028         {
28156 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
28157 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
28158 .... 2031                 item.source,
28159 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
28160 .... 2033             ));
28161 .... 2034         }
28162 .... 2035     }
28163 .... 2036 
28164 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
28165 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
28166 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
28167 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
28168 .... 2041         }
28169 .... 2042     }
28170 .... 2043 
28171 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
28172 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
28173 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
28174 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
28175 .... 2048         ));
28176 .... 2049     }
28177 .... 2050 
28178 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
28179 .... 2052 }

28220 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
28221 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
28222 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
28223 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
28224 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
28225 .... 2299             query,
28226 .... 2300             intent,

28228 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {

28233 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
28234 .... 2308                 }),
28235 .... 2309             },
28236 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
28237 .... 2311         },
28238 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
28239 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
28240 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
28241 .... 2315             },
28242 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
28243 .... 2317         },
28244 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
28245 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
28246 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
28247 .... 2321             },
28248 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
28249 .... 2323         },
28250 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
28251 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
28252 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
28253 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
28254 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
28255 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
28256 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
28257 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
28258 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
28259 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
28260 .... 2334                 },
28261 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
28262 .... 2336             }
28263 .... 2337         }

28265 .... 2339             branches,
28266 .... 2340             rationale,
28267 .... 2341         } => {

28275 .... 2349             }

28277 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {

28280 .... 2354                 },
28281 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),

   33  1 # Recursive Planner Proof
   34  2 
   35  3 ## Implemented Backbone
   36  4 
   37  5 - Interpretation-time operator memory now includes `AGENTS.md` plus linked foundational guidance excerpts in [agent_memory.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs).
   38  6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
   39  7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
   40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
   41  9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).

 2619 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 2620 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 2621 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 2622 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 2623 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
 2624 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 2625 2552 ... 269     {
 2626 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 2627 2554 ... 271             continue;
 2628 2555 ... 272         };
 2629 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 2630 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 2631 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 2632 2559 ... 276         }
 2633 2560 ... 277     }
 2634 2561 ... 278     ordered
 2635 2562 ... 279 }
 2636 2563 ... 280 
 2637 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2638 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 2639 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 2640 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 2641 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 2642 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 2643 2570 ... 287             break;
 2644 2571 ... 288         };
 2645 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 2646 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 2647 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 2648 2575 ... 292         }
 2649 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 2650 2577 ... 294     }
 2651 2578 ... 295     targets
 2652 2579 ... 296 }
 2653 2580 ... 297 
 2654 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2655 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 2656 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 2657 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 2658 2585 ... 302 
 2659 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 2660 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 2661 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
 2662 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 2663 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 2664 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 2665 2592 ... 309                 }
 2666 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
 2667 2594 ... 311             }
 2668 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 2669 2596 ... 313             continue;
 2670 2597 ... 314         }
 2671 2598 ... 315 
 2672 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
 2673 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 2674 2601 ... 318         }
 2675 2602 ... 319     }
 2676 2603 ... 320 
 2677 2604 ... 321     targets
 2678 2605 ... 322 }
 2679 2606 ... 323 
 2680 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 2681 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 2682 2609 ... 326 }
 2683 2610 ... 327 
 2684 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 2685 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 2686 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 2687 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 2688 2615 ... 332     {
 2689 2616 ... 333         return None;
 2690 2617 ... 334     }
 2691 2618 ... 335 
 2692 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 2693 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 2694 2621 ... 338         return None;
 2695 2622 ... 339     }
 2696 2623 ... 340 
 2697 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 2698 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 2699 2626 ... 343     } else {
 2700 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 2701 2628 ... 345     };
 2702 2629 ... 346 
 2703 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 2704 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 2705 2632 ... 349     } else {
 2706 2633 ... 350         None
 2707 2634 ... 351     }
 2708 2635 ... 352 }

 2715 2642 171 365 }

 2719 2646 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
 2720 2647 ... 370         .display()

 2724 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 2725 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 2726 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 2727 2654 ... 377 
 2728 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 2729 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 2730 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 2731 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 2732 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 2733 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 2734 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
 2735 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 2736 2663 ... 386                 .count();
 2737 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 2738 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 2739 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 2740 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 2741 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 2742 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 2743 2670 ... 393                     break;
 2744 2671 ... 394                 }
 2745 2672 ... 395             }
 2746 2673 ... 396         }
 2747 2674 ... 397     }
 2748 2675 ... 398 
 2749 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 2750 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 2751 2678 ... 401             lines
 2752 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 2753 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 2754 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
 2755 2682 ... 405         );
 2756 2683 ... 406     }
 2757 2684 ... 407 
 2758 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 2759 2686 ... 409 }
 2760 2687 ... 410 
 2761 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 2762 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 2763 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 2764 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 2765 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 2766 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 2767 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
 2768 2695 ... 418                 *term,
 2769 2696 ... 419                 "the"
 2770 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
 2771 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
 2772 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
 2773 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
 2774 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
 2775 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
 2776 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
 2777 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
 2778 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
 2779 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
 2780 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
 2781 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
 2782 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
 2783 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
 2784 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
 2785 2712 ... 435             )
 2786 2713 ... 436         })
 2787 2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
 2788 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 2789 2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
 2790 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
 2791 2718 ... 441     terms
 2792 2719 ... 442 }

 2909 2836  ...  826     pub fn select_planner_action(
 2910 2837  ...  827         &self,
 2911 2838  ...  828         request: &PlannerRequest,
 2912 2839  ...  829     ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
 2913 2840  ...  830         let mut conversation = self.conversation_factory.start_conversation()?;
 2914 2841  ...  831         let mut reply = self.send_to_model(
 2915 2842  ...  832             conversation.as_mut(),
 2916 2843  ...  833             &build_planner_action_prompt(&PlannerPrompt {
 2917 2844  ...  834                 workspace_root: &request.workspace_root,
 2918 2845  ...  835                 user_prompt: &request.user_prompt,
 2919 2846  ...  836                 interpretation: &request.interpretation,
 2920 2847  ...  837                 request,
 2921 2848  ...  838             }),
 2922 2849  ...  839         )?;
 2923 2850  ...  840 
 2924 2851  ...  841         if is_blank_model_reply(&reply) || parse_planner_action(&reply)?.is_none() {
 2925 2852  ...  842             self.log_retry_reason(
 2926 2853  ...  843                 "planner-retry",
 2927 2854  ...  844                 &reply,
 2928 2855  ...  845                 "missing or invalid planner action response",
 2929 2856  ...  846             );
 2930 2857  ...  847             reply =
 2931 2858  ...  848                 self.send_to_model(conversation.as_mut(), &build_planner_retry_prompt(request))?;
 2932 2859  ...  849         }
 2933 2860  ...  850 
 2934 2861  ...  851         if let Some(decision) = parse_planner_action(&reply)? {
 2935 2862  ...  852             return Ok(decision);
 2936 2863  ...  853         }
 2937 2864  ...  854 
 2938 2865  ...  855         self.log_retry_reason(
 2939 2866  ...  856             "planner-fallback",
 2940 2867  ...  857             &reply,
 2941 2868  ...  858             "falling back to bounded heuristic planner action",
 2942 2869  ...  859         );
 2943 2870  ...  860         Ok(fallback_planner_action(request))
 2944 2871  ...  861     }

 3112 3039 .... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {

 3114 3041 .... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
 3115 3042 .... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
 3116 3043 .... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
 3117 3044 .... 1597 \n\
 3118 3045 .... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
 3119 3046 .... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3120 3047 .... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3121 3048 .... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3122 3049 .... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3123 3050 .... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3124 3051 .... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
 3125 3052 .... 1605 \n\
 3126 3053 .... 1606 Rules:\n\
 3127 3054 .... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
 3128 3055 .... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
 3129 3056 .... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
 3130 3057 .... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
 3131 3058 .... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
 3132 3059 .... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
 3133 3060 .... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\
 3134 3061 .... 1614 - Inspect commands must stay read-only.\n\
 3135 3062 .... 1615 \n\

 3137 3064 .... 1617 {}\n\
 3138 3065 .... 1618 \n\

 3146 3073 .... 1626 {}\n\
 3147 3074 .... 1627 \n\

 3149 3076 .... 1629 {}\n",

 3151 3078 .... 1631         format_interpretation_context_digest(prompt.interpretation),
 3152 3079 .... 1632         format_recent_turn_list(&prompt.request.recent_turns),
 3153 3080 .... 1633         format_planner_loop_state_digest(prompt.request),
 3154 3081 .... 1634         prompt.user_prompt,
 3155 3082 .... 1635     )
 3156 3083 .... 1636 }

 3254 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
 3255 3182 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
 3256 3183 .... 1998         .budget
 3257 3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
 3258 3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
 3259 3186 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
 3260 3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
 3261 3188 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
 3262 3189 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
 3263 3190 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
 3264 3191 .... 2006     )];
 3265 3192 .... 2007 
 3266 3193 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
 3267 3194 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
 3268 3195 .... 2010     } else {
 3269 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
 3270 3197 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
 3271 3198 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
 3272 3199 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
 3273 3200 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
 3274 3201 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
 3275 3202 .... 2017             ));
 3276 3203 .... 2018         }
 3277 3204 .... 2019     }
 3278 3205 .... 2020 
 3279 3206 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
 3280 3207 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
 3281 3208 .... 2023         for item in request
 3282 3209 .... 2024             .loop_state

 3691   38  6 - The recursive planner contract lives in [planning.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/ports/planning.rs) and is rendered through typed turn events in [turns.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/domain/model/turns.rs).
 3692   39  7 - The application now routes non-trivial turns through a planner-owned loop in [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with bounded `search`, `read`, `inspect`, `refine`, `branch`, and `stop` actions.
 3693   40  8 - Planner and synthesizer roles are independently configurable through [main.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/main.rs) and [mod.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/application/mod.rs), with the planner adapter wired in [sift_planner.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_planner.rs) and planner action selection implemented in [sift_agent.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/adapters/sift_agent.rs).
 3694   41  9 - The default transcript UI now renders interpretation context, planner capability, planner actions, and planner summaries in [interactive_tui.rs](/home/alex/workspace/spoke-sh/paddles/src/infrastructure/cli/interactive_tui.rs).

 5047 1394 1296 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
 5048 1395 1297 ...  571         &self,
 5049 1396 1298 ...  572         prompt: &str,
 5050 1397 1299 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
 5051 1398 1300 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
 5052 1399 1301 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
 5053 1400 1302 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
 5054 1401 1303 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
 5055 1402 1304 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
 5056 1403 1305 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
 5057 1404 1306 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
 5058 1405 1307 ...  581             .prepared
 5059 1406 1308 ...  582             .gatherer
 5060 1407 1309 ...  583             .as_ref()
 5061 1408 1310 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
 5062 1409 1311 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
 5063 1410 1312 ...  586 
 5064 1411 1313 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
 5065 1412 1314 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
 5066 1413 1315 ...  589                 prompt,
 5067 1414 1316 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
 5068 1415 1317 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
 5069 1416 1318 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
 5070 1417 1319 ...  593             )
 5071 1418 1320 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
 5072 1419 1321 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
 5073 1420 1322 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
 5074 1421 1323 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
 5075 1422 1324 ...  598                 sequence,
 5076 1423 1325 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
 5077 1424 1326 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
 5078 1425 1327 ...  601             });
 5079 1426 1328 ...  602 
 5080 1427 1329 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
 5081 1428 1330 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
 5082 1429 1331 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
 5083 1430 1332 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
 5084 1431 1333 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
 5085 1432 1334 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
 5086 1433 1335 ...  609                         });
 5087 1434 1336 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
 5088 1435 1337 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
 5089 1436 1338 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
 5090 1437 1339 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
 5091 1438 1340 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
 5092 1439 1341 ...  615                                     intent
 5093 1440 1342 ...  616                                         .clone()
 5094 1441 1343 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
 5095 1442 1344 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
