 6297 2644 2546 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 6298 2645 2547 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 6299 2646 2548 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 6300 2647 2549 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 6301 2648 2550 ... 267         .into_iter()
 6302 2649 2551 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 6303 2650 2552 ... 269     {
 6304 2651 2553 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 6305 2652 2554 ... 271             continue;
 6306 2653 2555 ... 272         };
 6307 2654 2556 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 6308 2655 2557 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 6309 2656 2558 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 6310 2657 2559 ... 276         }
 6311 2658 2560 ... 277     }
 6312 2659 2561 ... 278     ordered
 6313 2660 2562 ... 279 }
 6314 2661 2563 ... 280 
 6315 2662 2564 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6316 2663 2565 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 6317 2664 2566 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 6318 2665 2567 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 6319 2666 2568 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 6320 2667 2569 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 6321 2668 2570 ... 287             break;
 6322 2669 2571 ... 288         };
 6323 2670 2572 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 6324 2671 2573 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 6325 2672 2574 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 6326 2673 2575 ... 292         }
 6327 2674 2576 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 6328 2675 2577 ... 294     }
 6329 2676 2578 ... 295     targets
 6330 2677 2579 ... 296 }
 6331 2678 2580 ... 297 
 6332 2679 2581 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6333 2680 2582 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 6334 2681 2583 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 6335 2682 2584 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 6336 2683 2585 ... 302 
 6337 2684 2586 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 6338 2685 2587 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 6339 2686 2588 ... 305             if in_tick {
 6340 2687 2589 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 6341 2688 2590 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 6342 2689 2591 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 6343 2690 2592 ... 309                 }
 6344 2691 2593 ... 310                 current.clear();
 6345 2692 2594 ... 311             }
 6346 2693 2595 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 6347 2694 2596 ... 313             continue;
 6348 2695 2597 ... 314         }
 6349 2696 2598 ... 315 
 6350 2697 2599 ... 316         if in_tick {
 6351 2698 2600 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 6352 2699 2601 ... 318         }
 6353 2700 2602 ... 319     }
 6354 2701 2603 ... 320 
 6355 2702 2604 ... 321     targets
 6356 2703 2605 ... 322 }

 6358 2705 2607 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 6359 2706 2608 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 6360 2707 2609 ... 326 }
 6361 2708 2610 ... 327 
 6362 2709 2611 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 6363 2710 2612 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 6364 2711 2613 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 6365 2712 2614 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 6366 2713 2615 ... 332     {
 6367 2714 2616 ... 333         return None;
 6368 2715 2617 ... 334     }
 6369 2716 2618 ... 335 
 6370 2717 2619 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 6371 2718 2620 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 6372 2719 2621 ... 338         return None;
 6373 2720 2622 ... 339     }
 6374 2721 2623 ... 340 
 6375 2722 2624 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 6376 2723 2625 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 6377 2724 2626 ... 343     } else {
 6378 2725 2627 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 6379 2726 2628 ... 345     };
 6380 2727 2629 ... 346 
 6381 2728 2630 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 6382 2729 2631 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 6383 2730 2632 ... 349     } else {
 6384 2731 2633 ... 350         None
 6385 2732 2634 ... 351     }
 6386 2733 2635 ... 352 }

 6389 2736 2638 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
 6390 2737 2639

 6396 2743 2645 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)

 6401 2748 2650 ... 373 
 6402 2749 2651 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 6403 2750 2652 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 6404 2751 2653 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 6405 2752 2654 ... 377 
 6406 2753 2655 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 6407 2754 2656 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 6408 2755 2657 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 6409 2756 2658 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 6410 2757 2659 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 6411 2758 2660 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 6412 2759 2661 ... 384                 .iter()
 6413 2760 2662 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 6414 2761 2663 ... 386                 .count();
 6415 2762 2664 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 6416 2763 2665 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 6417 2764 2666 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 6418 2765 2667 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 6419 2766 2668 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 6420 2767 2669 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 6421 2768 2670 ... 393                     break;
 6422 2769 2671 ... 394                 }
 6423 2770 2672 ... 395             }
 6424 2771 2673 ... 396         }
 6425 2772 2674 ... 397     }
 6426 2773 2675 ... 398 
 6427 2774 2676 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 6428 2775 2677 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 6429 2776 2678 ... 401             lines
 6430 2777 2679 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 6431 2778 2680 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 6432 2779 2681 ... 404                 .take(8),
 6433 2780 2682 ... 405         );
 6434 2781 2683 ... 406     }
 6435 2782 2684 ... 407 
 6436 2783 2685 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 6437 2784 2686 ... 409 }
 6438 2785 2687 ... 410 
 6439 2786 2688 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 6440 2787 2689 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 6441 2788 2690 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 6442 2789 2691 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 6443 2790 2692 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 6444 2791 2693 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 6445 2792 2694 ... 417             !matches!(
 6446 2793 2695 ... 418                 *term,
 6447 2794 2696 ... 419                 "the"
 6448 2795 2697 ... 420                     | "and"
 6449 2796 2698 ... 421                     | "with"
 6450 2797 2699 ... 422                     | "from"
 6451 2798 2700 ... 423                     | "into"
 6452 2799 2701 ... 424                     | "that"
 6453 2800 2702 ... 425                     | "this"
 6454 2801 2703 ... 426                     | "what"
 6455 2802 2704 ... 427                     | "when"
 6456 2803 2705 ... 428                     | "where"
 6457 2804 2706 ... 429                     | "which"
 6458 2805 2707 ... 430                     | "would"
 6459 2806 2708 ... 431                     | "could"
 6460 2807 2709 ... 432                     | "should"
 6461 2808 2710 ... 433                     | "about"
 6462 2809 2711 ... 434                     | "your"
 6463 2810 2712 ... 435             )
 6464 2811 2713 ... 436         })
 6465 2812 2714 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
 6466 2813 2715 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 6467 2814 2716 ... 439     terms.sort();
 6468 2815 2717 ... 440     terms.dedup();
 6469 2816 2718 ... 441     terms
 6470 2817 2719 ... 442 }

 6932 3279 3181 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
 6933 3280 3182 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
 6934 3281 3183 .... 1998         .budget
 6935 3282 3184 .... 1999         .max_steps
 6936 3283 3185 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
 6937 3284 3186 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
 6938 3285 3187 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
 6939 3286 3188 .... 2003         remaining_steps,

 6943 3290 3192 .... 2007 
 6944 3291 3193 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
 6945 3292 3194 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
 6946 3293 3195 .... 2010     } else {
 6947 3294 3196 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
 6948 3295 3197 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
 6949 3296 3198 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
 6950 3297 3199 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
 6951 3298 3200 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
 6952 3299 3201 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
 6953 3300 3202 .... 2017             ));
 6954 3301 3203 .... 2018         }
 6955 3302 3204 .... 2019     }
 6956 3303 3205 .... 2020 
 6957 3304 3206 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
 6958 3305 3207 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
 6959 3306 3208 .... 2023         for item in request
 6960 3307 3209 .... 2024             .loop_state
 6961 3308 3210 .... 2025             .evidence_items
 6962 3309 3211 .... 2026             .iter()

 6964 3311 3213 .... 2028         {
 6965 3312 3214 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
 6966 3313 3215 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
 6967 3314 3216 .... 2031                 item.source,
 6968 3315 3217 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
 6969 3316 3218 .... 2033             ));
 6970 3317 3219 .... 2034         }
 6971 3318 3220 .... 2035     }
 6972 3319 3221 .... 2036 
 6973 3320 3222 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
 6974 3321 3223 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
 6975 3322 3224 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
 6976 3323 3225 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));

 6978 3325 3227 .... 2042     }

 9270 5617 ...                                     1176 fn planner_action_query(action: &Pl

 9722 6069 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
 9723 6070 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
 9724 6071 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
 9725 6072 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
 9726 6073 ... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
 9727 6074 ... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
 9728 6075 ... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
 9729 6076 ... 191         return Ok(None);
 9730 6077 ... 192     }
 9731 6078 ... 193

 9754 6101 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
 9755 6102 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
 9756 6103 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
 9757 6104 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
 9758 6105 ... 267         .into_iter()
 9759 6106 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
 9760 6107 ... 269     {
 9761 6108 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
 9762 6109 ... 271             continue;
 9763 6110 ... 272         };
 9764 6111 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
 9765 6112 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
 9766 6113 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
 9767 6114 ... 276         }
 9768 6115 ... 277     }
 9769 6116 ... 278     ordered
 9770 6117 ... 279 }
 9771 6118 ... 280 
 9772 6119 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9773 6120 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 9774 6121 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
 9775 6122 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
 9776 6123 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
 9777 6124 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
 9778 6125 ... 287             break;
 9779 6126 ... 288         };
 9780 6127 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
 9781 6128 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
 9782 6129 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
 9783 6130 ... 292         }
 9784 6131 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
 9785 6132 ... 294     }
 9786 6133 ... 295     targets
 9787 6134 ... 296 }
 9788 6135 ... 297 
 9789 6136 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9790 6137 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
 9791 6138 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
 9792 6139 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
 9793 6140 ... 302 
 9794 6141 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
 9795 6142 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
 9796 6143 ... 305             if in_tick {
 9797 6144 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
 9798 6145 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
 9799 6146 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
 9800 6147 ... 309                 }
 9801 6148 ... 310                 current.clear();
 9802 6149 ... 311             }
 9803 6150 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
 9804 6151 ... 313             continue;
 9805 6152 ... 314         }
 9806 6153 ... 315 
 9807 6154 ... 316         if in_tick {
 9808 6155 ... 317             current.push(ch);
 9809 6156 ... 318         }
 9810 6157 ... 319     }
 9811 6158 ... 320 
 9812 6159 ... 321     targets
 9813 6160 ... 322 }
 9814 6161 ... 323 
 9815 6162 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
 9816 6163 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
 9817 6164 ... 326 }
 9818 6165 ... 327 
 9819 6166 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
 9820 6167 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
 9821 6168 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
 9822 6169 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
 9823 6170 ... 332     {
 9824 6171 ... 333         return None;
 9825 6172 ... 334     }
 9826 6173 ... 335 
 9827 6174 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
 9828 6175 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
 9829 6176 ... 338         return None;
 9830 6177 ... 339     }
 9831 6178 ... 340 
 9832 6179 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
 9833 6180 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
 9834 6181 ... 343     } else {
 9835 6182 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
 9836 6183 ... 345     };
 9837 6184 ... 346 
 9838 6185 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
 9839 6186 ... 348         Some(candidate)
 9840 6187 ... 349     } else {
 9841 6188 ... 350         None
 9842 6189 ... 351     }
 9843 6190 ... 352 }

 9846 6193 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
 9847 6194 
 9848 6195 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
 9849 6196 170 364     trimmed
 9850 6197 171 365 }

 9853 6200 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
 9854 6201 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
 9855 6202 ... 370         .display()
 9856 6203 ... 371         .to_string()

 9859 6206 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
 9860 6207 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
 9861 6208 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
 9862 6209 ... 377 
 9863 6210 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
 9864 6211 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
 9865 6212 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
 9866 6213 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
 9867 6214 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
 9868 6215 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
 9869 6216 ... 384                 .iter()
 9870 6217 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
 9871 6218 ... 386                 .count();
 9872 6219 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
 9873 6220 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
 9874 6221 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
 9875 6222 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
 9876 6223 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
 9877 6224 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
 9878 6225 ... 393                     break;
 9879 6226 ... 394                 }
 9880 6227 ... 395             }
 9881 6228 ... 396         }
 9882 6229 ... 397     }
 9883 6230 ... 398 
 9884 6231 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
 9885 6232 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
 9886 6233 ... 401             lines
 9887 6234 ... 402                 .into_iter()
 9888 6235 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
 9889 6236 ... 404                 .take(8),
 9890 6237 ... 405         );
 9891 6238 ... 406     }
 9892 6239 ... 407 
 9893 6240 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
 9894 6241 ... 409 }
 9895 6242 ... 410 
 9896 6243 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
 9897 6244 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
 9898 6245 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
 9899 6246 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
 9900 6247 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
 9901 6248 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
 9902 6249 ... 417             !matches!(
 9903 6250 ... 418                 *term,
 9904 6251 ... 419                 "the"
 9905 6252 ... 420                     | "and"
 9906 6253 ... 421                     | "with"
 9907 6254 ... 422                     | "from"
 9908 6255 ... 423                     | "into"
 9909 6256 ... 424                     | "that"
 9910 6257 ... 425                     | "this"
 9911 6258 ... 426                     | "what"
 9912 6259 ... 427                     | "when"
 9913 6260 ... 428                     | "where"
 9914 6261 ... 429                     | "which"
 9915 6262 ... 430                     | "would"
 9916 6263 ... 431                     | "could"
 9917 6264 ... 432                     | "should"
 9918 6265 ... 433                     | "about"
 9919 6266 ... 434                     | "your"
 9920 6267 ... 435             )
 9921 6268 ... 436         })
 9922 6269 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
 9923 6270 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
 9924 6271 ... 439     terms.sort();
 9925 6272 ... 440     terms.dedup();
 9926 6273 ... 441     terms
 9927 6274 ... 442 }

10389 6736 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
10390 6737 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
10391 6738 .... 1998         .budget
10392 6739 .... 1999         .max_steps
10393 6740 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
10394 6741 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
10395 6742 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
10396 6743 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
10397 6744 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
10398 6745 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
10399 6746 .... 2006     )];
10400 6747 .... 2007 
10401 6748 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
10402 6749 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
10403 6750 .... 2010     } else {
10404 6751 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
10405 6752 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
10406 6753 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
10407 6754 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
10408 6755 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
10409 6756 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
10410 6757 .... 2017             ));
10411 6758 .... 2018         }
10412 6759 .... 2019     }
10413 6760 .... 2020 
10414 6761 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
10415 6762 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
10416 6763 .... 2023         for item in request
10417 6764 .... 2024             .loop_state
10418 6765 .... 2025             .evidence_items
10419 6766 .... 2026             .iter()
10420 6767 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
10421 6768 .... 2028         {
10422 6769 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
10423 6770 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
10424 6771 .... 2031                 item.source,
10425 6772 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
10426 6773 .... 2033             ));
10427 6774 .... 2034         }
10428 6775 .... 2035     }
10429 6776 .... 2036 
10430 6777 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
10431 6778 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
10432 6779 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
10433 6780 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
10434 6781 .... 2041         }
10435 6782 .... 2042     }
10436 6783 .... 2043 
10437 6784 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
10438 6785 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
10439 6786 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
10440 6787 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
10441 6788 .... 2048         ));
10442 6789 .... 2049     }
10443 6790 .... 2050 
10444 6791 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
10445 6792 .... 2052 }

10492 6839 .... 2300             intent,
10493 6840 .... 2301             rationale,
10494 6841 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
10495 6842 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {

10499 6846 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())

10507 6854 .... 2315             },
10508 6855 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
10509 6856 .... 2317         },
10510 6857 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
10511 6858 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
10512 6859 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
10513 6860 .... 2321             },
10514 6861 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
10515 6862 .... 2323         },
10516 6863 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
10517 6864 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
10518 6865 .... 2326                 .as_deref()

10520 6867 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
10521 6868 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);

10523 6870 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
10524 6871 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
10525 6872 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
10526 6873 .... 2334                 },
10527 6874 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
10528 6875 .... 2336             }
10529 6876 .... 2337         }

10543 6890 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {

10546 6893 .... 2354                 },

10569 6916 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {

10577 6924 .... 2385         };

10579 6926 .... 2387

10582 6929 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {

10594 6941 .... 2402         },
10595 6942 .... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"

11965 ...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
11966 ...  571         &self,
11967 ...  572         prompt: &str,
11968 ...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
11969 ...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
11970 ...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
11971 ...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
11972 ...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
11973 ...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
11974 ...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
11975 ...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
11976 ...  581             .prepared
11977 ...  582             .gatherer
11978 ...  583             .as_ref()
11979 ...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
11980 ...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
11981 ...  586 
11982 ...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
11983 ...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
11984 ...  589                 prompt,
11985 ...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
11986 ...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
11987 ...  592                 budget.clone(),
11988 ...  593             )
11989 ...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
11990 ...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
11991 ...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
11992 ...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
11993 ...  598                 sequence,
11994 ...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
11995 ...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
11996 ...  601             });
11997 ...  602 
11998 ...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
11999 ...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
12000 ...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
12001 ...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
12002 ...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
12003 ...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
12004 ...  609                         });
12005 ...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
12006 ...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
12007 ...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
12008 ...  613                                     query.clone(),
12009 ...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
12010 ...  615                                     intent
12011 ...  616                                         .clone()
12012 ...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
12013 ...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
12014 ...  619                                 )
12015 ...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
12016 ...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
12017 ...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
12018 ...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
12019 ...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
12020 ...  625                                         &loop_state,

13183 ... 184 fn load_memory_document(
13184 ... 185     path: PathBuf,
13185 ... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
13186 ... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {

13190 ... 191         return Ok(None);
13191 ... 192     }

13196 ... 197         kind,
13197 ... 198     }))

13215 ... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
13216 ... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
13217 ... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
13218 ... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
13219 ... 267         .into_iter()
13220 ... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
13221 ... 269     {
13222 ... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
13223 ... 271             continue;
13224 ... 272         };
13225 ... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
13226 ... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
13227 ... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
13228 ... 276         }
13229 ... 277     }
13230 ... 278     ordered
13231 ... 279 }
13232 ... 280 
13233 ... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13234 ... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
13235 ... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
13236 ... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
13237 ... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
13238 ... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
13239 ... 287             break;
13240 ... 288         };
13241 ... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
13242 ... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
13243 ... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
13244 ... 292         }
13245 ... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
13246 ... 294     }
13247 ... 295     targets
13248 ... 296 }
13249 ... 297 
13250 ... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13251 ... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
13252 ... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
13253 ... 301     let mut current = String::new();
13254 ... 302 
13255 ... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
13256 ... 304         if ch == '`' {
13257 ... 305             if in_tick {
13258 ... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
13259 ... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
13260 ... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
13261 ... 309                 }
13262 ... 310                 current.clear();
13263 ... 311             }
13264 ... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
13265 ... 313             continue;
13266 ... 314         }
13267 ... 315 
13268 ... 316         if in_tick {
13269 ... 317             current.push(ch);
13270 ... 318         }
13271 ... 319     }
13272 ... 320 
13273 ... 321     targets
13274 ... 322 }
13275 ... 323 
13276 ... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
13277 ... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
13278 ... 326 }
13279 ... 327 
13280 ... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
13281 ... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
13282 ... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
13283 ... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
13284 ... 332     {
13285 ... 333         return None;
13286 ... 334     }
13287 ... 335 
13288 ... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
13289 ... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
13290 ... 338         return None;
13291 ... 339     }
13292 ... 340 
13293 ... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
13294 ... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
13295 ... 343     } else {
13296 ... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
13297 ... 345     };
13298 ... 346 
13299 ... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
13300 ... 348         Some(candidate)
13301 ... 349     } else {
13302 ... 350         None
13303 ... 351     }
13304 ... 352 }
13305 159 353 
13306 160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
13307 161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {
13308 
13309 src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
13310 170 364     trimmed
13311 171 365 }

13313 ... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
13314 ... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
13315 ... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
13316 ... 370         .display()
13317 ... 371         .to_string()
13318 ... 372 }
13319 ... 373 
13320 ... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
13321 ... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
13322 ... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
13323 ... 377 
13324 ... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
13325 ... 379     let mut score = 0;
13326 ... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
13327 ... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
13328 ... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
13329 ... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
13330 ... 384                 .iter()
13331 ... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
13332 ... 386                 .count();
13333 ... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
13334 ... 388                 score += matched_terms;
13335 ... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
13336 ... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
13337 ... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
13338 ... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
13339 ... 393                     break;
13340 ... 394                 }
13341 ... 395             }
13342 ... 396         }
13343 ... 397     }
13344 ... 398 
13345 ... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
13346 ... 400         excerpt.extend(
13347 ... 401             lines
13348 ... 402                 .into_iter()
13349 ... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
13350 ... 404                 .take(8),
13351 ... 405         );
13352 ... 406     }
13353 ... 407 
13354 ... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
13355 ... 409 }
13356 ... 410 
13357 ... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
13358 ... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
13359 ... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
13360 ... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
13361 ... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
13362 ... 416         .filter(|term| {
13363 ... 417             !matches!(
13364 ... 418                 *term,
13365 ... 419                 "the"
13366 ... 420                     | "and"
13367 ... 421                     | "with"
13368 ... 422                     | "from"
13369 ... 423                     | "into"
13370 ... 424                     | "that"
13371 ... 425                     | "this"
13372 ... 426                     | "what"
13373 ... 427                     | "when"
13374 ... 428                     | "where"
13375 ... 429                     | "which"
13376 ... 430                     | "would"
13377 ... 431                     | "could"
13378 ... 432                     | "should"
13379 ... 433                     | "about"
13380 ... 434                     | "your"
13381 ... 435             )
13382 ... 436         })
13383 ... 437         .map(str::to_string)
13384 ... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
13385 ... 439     terms.sort();
13386 ... 440     terms.dedup();
13387 ... 441     terms
13388 ... 442 }

13850 .... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
13851 .... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
13852 .... 1998         .budget
13853 .... 1999         .max_steps
13854 .... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
13855 .... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
13856 .... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
13857 .... 2003         remaining_steps,
13858 .... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
13859 .... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
13860 .... 2006     )];
13861 .... 2007 
13862 .... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
13863 .... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
13864 .... 2010     } else {
13865 .... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
13866 .... 2012             lines.push(format!(
13867 .... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
13868 .... 2014                 step.sequence,
13869 .... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
13870 .... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
13871 .... 2017             ));
13872 .... 2018         }
13873 .... 2019     }
13874 .... 2020 
13875 .... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
13876 .... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
13877 .... 2023         for item in request
13878 .... 2024             .loop_state
13879 .... 2025             .evidence_items
13880 .... 2026             .iter()
13881 .... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
13882 .... 2028         {
13883 .... 2029             lines.push(format!(
13884 .... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
13885 .... 2031                 item.source,
13886 .... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
13887 .... 2033             ));
13888 .... 2034         }
13889 .... 2035     }
13890 .... 2036 
13891 .... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
13892 .... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
13893 .... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
13894 .... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
13895 .... 2041         }
13896 .... 2042     }
13897 .... 2043 
13898 .... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
13899 .... 2045         lines.push(format!(
13900 .... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
13901 .... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
13902 .... 2048         ));
13903 .... 2049     }
13904 .... 2050 
13905 .... 2051     lines.join("\n")
13906 .... 2052 }

13947 .... 2294 fn planner_action_from_envelope(
13948 .... 2295     envelope: PlannerActionEnvelope,
13949 .... 2296 ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
13950 .... 2297     let decision = match envelope {
13951 .... 2298         PlannerActionEnvelope::Search {
13952 .... 2299             query,
13953 .... 2300             intent,
13954 .... 2301             rationale,
13955 .... 2302         } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
13956 .... 2303             action: PlannerAction::Search {
13957 .... 2304                 query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
13958 .... 2305                 intent: intent.and_then(|value| {
13959 .... 2306                     let trimmed = value.trim();
13960 .... 2307                     (!trimmed.is_empty()).then(|| trimmed.to_string())
13961 .... 2308                 }),
13962 .... 2309             },
13963 .... 2310             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
13964 .... 2311         },
13965 .... 2312         PlannerActionEnvelope::Read { path, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
13966 .... 2313             action: PlannerAction::Read {
13967 .... 2314                 path: required_planner_field("path", path)?,
13968 .... 2315             },
13969 .... 2316             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
13970 .... 2317         },
13971 .... 2318         PlannerActionEnvelope::Inspect { command, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
13972 .... 2319             action: PlannerAction::Inspect {
13973 .... 2320                 command: required_planner_field("command", command)?,
13974 .... 2321             },
13975 .... 2322             rationale: required_planner_field("rationale", rationale)?,
13976 .... 2323         },
13977 .... 2324         PlannerActionEnvelope::Refine { query, rationale } => {
13978 .... 2325             let rationale_text = rationale
13979 .... 2326                 .as_deref()
13980 .... 2327                 .map(str::trim)
13981 .... 2328                 .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())
13982 .... 2329                 .map(str::to_string);
13983 .... 2330             RecursivePlannerDecision {
13984 .... 2331                 action: PlannerAction::Refine {
13985 .... 2332                     query: required_planner_field("query", query)?,
13986 .... 2333                     rationale: rationale_text.clone(),
13987 .... 2334                 },
13988 .... 2335                 rationale: rationale_text.unwrap_or_else(|| "refine the investigation".to_string()),
13989 .... 2336             }
13990 .... 2337         }
13991 .... 2338         PlannerActionEnvelope::Branch {
13992 .... 2339             branches,
13993 .... 2340             rationale,
13994 .... 2341         } => {
13995 .... 2342             let branches = branches
13996 .... 2343                 .into_iter()

13999 .... 2346                 .collect::<Vec<_>>();
14000 .... 2347             if branches.is_empty() {
14001 .... 2348                 bail!("planner branch action must include at least one branch");
14002 .... 2349             }
14003 .... 2350             RecursivePlannerDecision {
14004 .... 2351                 action: PlannerAction::Branch {
14005 .... 2352                     branches,
14006 .... 2353                     rationale: rationale.clone(),
14007 .... 2354                 },
14008 .... 2355                 rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "branch the investigation".to_string()),
14009 .... 2356             }
14010 .... 2357         }
14011 .... 2358         PlannerActionEnvelope::Stop { reason, rationale } => RecursivePlannerDecision {
14012 .... 2359             action: PlannerAction::Stop {
14013 .... 2360                 reason: required_planner_field("reason", reason)?,
14014 .... 2361             },
14015 .... 2362             rationale: rationale.unwrap_or_else(|| "stop planning".to_string()),
14016 .... 2363         },
14017 .... 2364     };

14030 .... 2377 fn fallback_planner_action(request: &PlannerRequest) -> RecursivePlannerDecision {
14031 .... 2378     if let Some(branch) = request.loop_state.pending_branches.first() {
14032 .... 2379         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
14033 .... 2380             action: PlannerAction::Search {
14034 .... 2381                 query: branch.clone(),
14035 .... 2382                 intent: Some("queued planner branch".to_string()),
14036 .... 2383             },
14037 .... 2384             rationale: "continue with the oldest queued branch".to_string(),
14038 .... 2385         };
14039 .... 2386     }
14040 .... 2387 
14041 .... 2388     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() && request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
14042 .... 2389         return RecursivePlannerDecision {
14043 .... 2390             action: PlannerAction::Search {
14044 .... 2391                 query: fallback_planner_query(&request.user_prompt),
14045 .... 2392                 intent: Some("initial planner fallback".to_string()),
14046 .... 2393             },
14047 .... 2394             rationale: "start with a bounded workspace search when the planner reply is invalid"
14048 .... 2395                 .to_string(),
14049 .... 2396         };
14050 .... 2397     }
14051 .... 2398 
14052 .... 2399     RecursivePlannerDecision {
14053 .... 2400         action: PlannerAction::Stop {
14054 .... 2401             reason: "planner fallback stop".to_string(),
14055 .... 2402         },
14056 .... 2403         rationale: "stop after invalid planner replies once some loop state already exists"
14057 .... 2404             .to_string(),
14058 .... 2405     }
14059 .... 2406 }

...  570     async fn execute_recursive_planner_loop(
...  571         &self,
...  572         prompt: &str,
...  573         context: PlannerLoopContext,
...  574         event_sink: Arc<dyn TurnEventSink>,
...  575     ) -> Result<Option<EvidenceBundle>> {
...  576         let budget = PlannerBudget::default();
...  577         let mut loop_state = PlannerLoopState::default();
...  578         let mut used_workspace_resources = false;
...  579         let mut stop_reason = None;
...  580         let gatherer_provider = context
...  581             .prepared
...  582             .gatherer
...  583             .as_ref()
...  584             .map(|lane| lane.label.clone())
...  585             .unwrap_or_else(|| "workspace".to_string());
...  586 
...  587         for sequence in 1..=budget.max_steps {
...  588             let request = PlannerRequest::new(
...  589                 prompt,
...  590                 self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  591                 context.interpretation.clone(),
...  592                 budget.clone(),
...  593             )
...  594             .with_recent_turns(context.recent_turns.clone())
...  595             .with_loop_state(loop_state.clone());
...  596             let decision = context.planner_engine.select_next_action(&request).await?;
...  597             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerActionSelected {
...  598                 sequence,
...  599                 action: decision.action.summary(),
...  600                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  601             });
...  602 
...  603             let outcome = match &decision.action {
...  604                 PlannerAction::Search { query, intent } => {
...  605                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
...  606                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
...  607                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  608                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
...  609                         });
...  610                         match gatherer.capability() {
...  611                             GathererCapability::Available => {
...  612                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
...  613                                     query.clone(),
...  614                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  615                                     intent
...  616                                         .clone()
...  617                                         .unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-search".to_string()),
...  618                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
...  619                                 )
...  620                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
...  621                                 .with_prior_context(
...  622                                     build_planner_prior_context(
...  623                                         &context.interpretation,
...  624                                         &context.recent_turns,
...  625                                         &loop_state,
...  626                                     ),
...  627                                 );
...  628                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
...  629                                     Ok(result) => {
...  630                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
...  631                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
...  632                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
...  633                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  634                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
...  635                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
...  636                                                     &self.workspace_root,
...  637                                                     bundle,
...  638                                                 ),
...  639                                             });
...  640                                             if let Some(planner) = bundle.planner.as_ref() {
...  641                                                 event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
...  642                                                     strategy: format_planner_strategy(
...  643                                                         &planner.strategy,
...  644                                                     )
...  645                                                     .to_string(),
...  646                                                     turns: planner.turn_count,
...  647                                                     steps: planner.steps.len(),
...  648                                                     stop_reason: planner.stop_reason.clone(),
...  649                                                 });
...  650                                             }
...  651                                             merge_evidence_items(
...  652                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  653                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
...  654                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
...  655                                             );
...  656                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
...  657                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
...  658                                             bundle.summary.clone()
...  659                                         } else {
...  660                                             "planner search returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
...  661                                         }
...  662                                     }
...  663                                     Err(err) => format!("planner search failed: {err:#}"),
...  664                                 }
...  665                             }
...  666                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
...  667                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
...  668                                 format!("planner search backend unavailable: {reason}")
...  669                             }
...  670                         }
...  671                     } else {
...  672                         "no gatherer backend is configured for planner search".to_string()
...  673                     }
...  674                 }
...  675                 PlannerAction::Read { path } => {
...  676                     if read_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_reads {
...  677                         stop_reason = Some("read-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  678                         "planner read budget exhausted".to_string()
...  679                     } else {
...  680                         let (source, snippet) = read_planner_file(&self.workspace_root, path)?;
...  681                         append_evidence_item(
...  682                             &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  683                             EvidenceItem {
...  684                                 source: source.clone(),
...  685                                 snippet,
...  686                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  687                                 rank: 0,
...  688                             },
...  689                             budget.max_evidence_items,
...  690                         );
...  691                         used_workspace_resources = true;
...  692                         format!("read {source}")
...  693                     }
...  694                 }
...  695                 PlannerAction::Inspect { command } => {
...  696                     if inspect_steps(&loop_state) >= budget.max_inspects {
...  697                         stop_reason = Some("inspect-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  698                         "planner inspect budget exhausted".to_string()
...  699                     } else {
...  700                         let output = run_planner_inspect_command(&self.workspace_root, command)?;
...  701                         append_evidence_item(
...  702                             &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  703                             EvidenceItem {
...  704                                 source: format!("command: {command}"),
...  705                                 snippet: trim_for_planner(&output, 800),
...  706                                 rationale: decision.rationale.clone(),
...  707                                 rank: 0,
...  708                             },
...  709                             budget.max_evidence_items,
...  710                         );
...  711                         used_workspace_resources = true;
...  712                         format!("inspected {command}")
...  713                     }
...  714                 }
...  715                 PlannerAction::Refine { query, .. } => {
...  716                     if let Some(gatherer) = context.gatherer.as_ref() {
...  717                         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererCapability {
...  718                             provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  719                             capability: format_gatherer_capability(&gatherer.capability()),
...  720                         });
...  721                         match gatherer.capability() {
...  722                             GathererCapability::Available => {
...  723                                 let request = ContextGatherRequest::new(
...  724                                     query.clone(),
...  725                                     self.workspace_root.clone(),
...  726                                     "planner-refine",
...  727                                     EvidenceBudget::default(),
...  728                                 )
...  729                                 .with_planning(PlannerConfig::default().with_step_limit(1))
...  730                                 .with_prior_context(
...  731                                     build_planner_prior_context(
...  732                                         &context.interpretation,
...  733                                         &context.recent_turns,
...  734                                         &loop_state,
...  735                                     ),
...  736                                 );
...  737                                 match gatherer.gather_context(&request).await {
...  738                                     Ok(result) => {
...  739                                         let bundle = result.evidence_bundle;
...  740                                         if let Some(bundle) = bundle.as_ref() {
...  741                                             event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::GathererSummary {
...  742                                                 provider: gatherer_provider.clone(),
...  743                                                 summary: bundle.summary.clone(),
...  744                                                 sources: evidence_sources(
...  745                                                     &self.workspace_root,
...  746                                                     bundle,
...  747                                                 ),
...  748                                             });
...  749                                             merge_evidence_items(
...  750                                                 &mut loop_state.evidence_items,
...  751                                                 bundle.items.clone(),
...  752                                                 budget.max_evidence_items,
...  753                                             );
...  754                                             loop_state.notes.extend(bundle.warnings.clone());
...  755                                             used_workspace_resources = true;
...  756                                             format!("refined search toward `{query}`")
...  757                                         } else {
...  758                                             "planner refine returned no evidence bundle".to_string()
...  759                                         }
...  760                                     }
...  761                                     Err(err) => format!("planner refine failed: {err:#}"),
...  762                                 }
...  763                             }
...  764                             GathererCapability::Unsupported { reason }
...  765                             | GathererCapability::HarnessRequired { reason } => {
...  766                                 format!("planner refine backend unavailable: {reason}")
...  767                             }
...  768                         }
...  769                     } else {
...  770                         "no gatherer backend is configured for refined planner search".to_string()
...  771                     }
...  772                 }
...  773                 PlannerAction::Branch { branches, .. } => {
...  774                     for branch in branches.iter().take(budget.max_branch_factor) {
...  775                         if !loop_state.pending_branches.contains(branch) {
...  776                             loop_state.pending_branches.push(branch.clone());
...  777                         }
...  778                     }
...  779                     format!(
...  780                         "queued {} planner branch(es)",
...  781                         branches.len().min(budget.max_branch_factor)
...  782                     )
...  783                 }
...  784                 PlannerAction::Stop { reason } => {
...  785                     stop_reason = Some(reason.clone());
...  786                     format!("planner requested synthesis: {reason}")
...  787                 }
...  788             };
...  789 
...  790             loop_state.steps.push(PlannerStepRecord {
...  791                 sequence,
...  792                 action: decision.action.clone(),
...  793                 outcome: outcome.clone(),
...  794             });
...  795 
...  796             if let PlannerAction::Stop { .. } = decision.action {
...  797                 break;
...  798             }
...  799 
...  800             if stop_reason.is_some() {
...  801                 break;
...  802             }
...  803         }
...  804 
...  805         let completed = stop_reason.is_some();
...  806         let stop_reason = stop_reason.unwrap_or_else(|| "planner-budget-exhausted".to_string());
...  807         event_sink.emit(TurnEvent::PlannerSummary {
...  808             strategy: "model-driven".to_string(),
...  809             turns: loop_state.steps.len(),
...  810             steps: loop_state.steps.len(),
...  811             stop_reason: Some(stop_reason.clone()),
...  812         });
...  813 
...  814         if !used_workspace_resources && planner_stopped_without_resource_use(&loop_state) {
...  815             return Ok(None);
...  816         }
...  817 
...  818         Ok(Some(build_planner_evidence_bundle(
...  819             &context.prepared,
...  820             prompt,
...  821             &loop_state,
...  822             completed,
...  823             &stop_reason,
...  824         )))
...  825     }

542 fn select_execution_plan(prompt: &s  840 fn select_execution_plan(prompt: &s

... 177 fn interpretation_kind_score(kind: MemoryDocumentKind) -> usize {
... 178     match kind {
... 179         MemoryDocumentKind::AgentMemory => 10,
... 180         MemoryDocumentKind::LinkedGuidance => 0,

... 184 fn load_memory_document(
... 185     path: PathBuf,
... 186     kind: MemoryDocumentKind,
... 187 ) -> std::io::Result<Option<MemoryDocument>> {
... 188     let contents = fs::read_to_string(&path)?;
... 189     let trimmed = contents.trim();
... 190     if trimmed.is_empty() {
... 191         return Ok(None);
... 192     }
... 193 
... 194     Ok(Some(MemoryDocument {
... 195         path,
... 196         contents: trimmed.to_string(),
... 197         kind,
... 198     }))
... 199 }

... 255 fn canonical_memory_path(path: &Path) -> PathBuf {
... 256     path.canonicalize().unwrap_or_else(|_| path.to_path_buf())
... 257 }
155 258 
156 259 fn default_user_memory_path() -> Option<PathBuf> {
157 260     env::var_os("HOME").map(|home| PathBuf::from(home).join(USER_MEMORY_RELATIVE_PATH))

... 262 
... 263 fn discover_linked_documents(agent_path: &Path, contents: &str) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
... 264     let mut ordered = Vec::new();
... 265     let mut seen = HashSet::new();
... 266     for target in extract_markdown_link_targets(contents)
... 267         .into_iter()
... 268         .chain(extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents))
... 269     {
... 270         let Some(resolved) = resolve_link_target(agent_path, &target) else {
... 271             continue;
... 272         };
... 273         let canonical = canonical_memory_path(&resolved);
... 274         if seen.insert(canonical) {
... 275             ordered.push(resolved);
... 276         }
... 277     }
... 278     ordered
... 279 }
... 280 
... 281 fn extract_markdown_link_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 282     let mut targets = Vec::new();
... 283     let mut remainder = contents;
... 284     while let Some(start) = remainder.find("](") {
... 285         let candidate = &remainder[start + 2..];
... 286         let Some(end) = candidate.find(')') else {
... 287             break;
... 288         };
... 289         let target = candidate[..end].trim();
... 290         if !target.is_empty() {
... 291             targets.push(target.to_string());
... 292         }
... 293         remainder = &candidate[end + 1..];
... 294     }
... 295     targets
... 296 }
... 297 
... 298 fn extract_backticked_doc_targets(contents: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 299     let mut targets = Vec::new();
... 300     let mut in_tick = false;
... 301     let mut current = String::new();
... 302 
... 303     for ch in contents.chars() {
... 304         if ch == '`' {
... 305             if in_tick {
... 306                 let trimmed = current.trim();
... 307                 if looks_like_local_doc_target(trimmed) {
... 308                     targets.push(trimmed.to_string());
... 309                 }
... 310                 current.clear();
... 311             }
... 312             in_tick = !in_tick;
... 313             continue;
... 314         }
... 315 
... 316         if in_tick {
... 317             current.push(ch);
... 318         }
... 319     }
... 320 
... 321     targets
... 322 }
... 323 
... 324 fn looks_like_local_doc_target(target: &str) -> bool {
... 325     target.ends_with(".md") || target.starts_with(".keel/")
... 326 }
... 327 
... 328 fn resolve_link_target(agent_path: &Path, target: &str) -> Option<PathBuf> {
... 329     if target.starts_with("http://")
... 330         || target.starts_with("https://")
... 331         || target.starts_with("mailto:")
... 332     {
... 333         return None;
... 334     }
... 335 
... 336     let target = target.split('#').next()?.trim();
... 337     if target.is_empty() || !looks_like_local_doc_target(target) {
... 338         return None;
... 339     }
... 340 
... 341     let candidate = if Path::new(target).is_absolute() {
... 342         PathBuf::from(target)
... 343     } else {
... 344         agent_path.parent()?.join(target)
... 345     };
... 346 
... 347     if candidate.is_file() {
... 348         Some(candidate)
... 349     } else {
... 350         None
... 351     }
... 352 }
159 353 
160 354 fn trim_memory_contents(contents: &str) -> String {
161 355     if contents.chars().count() <= MAX_MEMORY_FILE_CHARS {

src/infrastructure/adapters/agent_memory.rs --- 8/9 --- Rust
170 364     trimmed
171 365 }
... 366 
... 367 fn display_path(workspace_root: &Path, path: &Path) -> String {
... 368     path.strip_prefix(workspace_root)
... 369         .unwrap_or(path)
... 370         .display()
... 371         .to_string()
... 372 }
... 373 
... 374 fn select_relevant_excerpt(contents: &str, user_prompt: &str) -> (String, usize) {
... 375     let query_terms = prompt_terms(user_prompt);
... 376     let lines = contents.lines().collect::<Vec<_>>();
... 377 
... 378     let mut excerpt = Vec::new();
... 379     let mut score = 0;
... 380     if !query_terms.is_empty() {
... 381         for (index, line) in lines.iter().enumerate() {
... 382             let normalized = line.to_ascii_lowercase();
... 383             let matched_terms = query_terms
... 384                 .iter()
... 385                 .filter(|term| normalized.contains(term.as_str()))
... 386                 .count();
... 387             if matched_terms > 0 {
... 388                 score += matched_terms;
... 389                 let start = index.saturating_sub(1);
... 390                 let end = usize::min(index + 3, lines.len());
... 391                 excerpt.extend(lines[start..end].iter().copied());
... 392                 if excerpt.len() >= 8 {
... 393                     break;
... 394                 }
... 395             }
... 396         }
... 397     }
... 398 
... 399     if excerpt.is_empty() {
... 400         excerpt.extend(
... 401             lines
... 402                 .into_iter()
... 403                 .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
... 404                 .take(8),
... 405         );
... 406     }
... 407 
... 408     (trim_memory_contents(&excerpt.join("\n")), score)
... 409 }
... 410 
... 411 fn prompt_terms(user_prompt: &str) -> Vec<String> {
... 412     let mut terms = user_prompt
... 413         .to_ascii_lowercase()
... 414         .split(|ch: char| !ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() && ch != '_' && ch != '.')
... 415         .filter(|term| term.len() >= 3)
... 416         .filter(|term| {
... 417             !matches!(
... 418                 *term,
... 419                 "the"
... 420                     | "and"
... 421                     | "with"
... 422                     | "from"
... 423                     | "into"
... 424                     | "that"
... 425                     | "this"
... 426                     | "what"
... 427                     | "when"
... 428                     | "where"
... 429                     | "which"
... 430                     | "would"
... 431                     | "could"
... 432                     | "should"
... 433                     | "about"
... 434                     | "your"
... 435             )
... 436         })
... 437         .map(str::to_string)
... 438         .collect::<Vec<_>>();
... 439     terms.sort();
... 440     terms.dedup();
... 441     terms
... 442 }

... 498             session_root.join("AGENTS.md"),
... 499             "See [Policy](POLICY.md) and `README.md`.",
... 500         )
... 501         .expect("agents");
... 502         fs::write(session_root.join("POLICY.md"), "policy guidance").expect("policy");

... 504

 ...  826     pub fn select_planner_action(
 ...  827         &self,
 ...  828         request: &PlannerRequest,
 ...  829     ) -> Result<RecursivePlannerDecision> {
 ...  830         let mut conversation = self.conversation_factory.start_conversation()?;
 ...  831         let mut reply = self.send_to_model(
 ...  832             conversation.as_mut(),
 ...  833             &build_planner_action_prompt(&PlannerPrompt {
 ...  834                 workspace_root: &request.workspace_root,
 ...  835                 user_prompt: &request.user_prompt,
 ...  836                 interpretation: &request.interpretation,
 ...  837                 request,
 ...  838             }),
 ...  839         )?;
 ...  840 
 ...  841         if is_blank_model_reply(&reply) || parse_planner_action(&reply)?.is_none() {
 ...  842             self.log_retry_reason(
 ...  843                 "planner-retry",
 ...  844                 &reply,
 ...  845                 "missing or invalid planner action response",
 ...  846             );
 ...  847             reply =
 ...  848                 self.send_to_model(conversation.as_mut(), &build_planner_retry_prompt(request))?;
 ...  849         }
 ...  850 
 ...  851         if let Some(decision) = parse_planner_action(&reply)? {
 ...  852             return Ok(decision);
 ...  853         }
 ...  854 
 ...  855         self.log_retry_reason(
 ...  856             "planner-fallback",
 ...  857             &reply,
 ...  858             "falling back to bounded heuristic planner action",
 ...  859         );
 ...  860         Ok(fallback_planner_action(request))
 ...  861     }
 ...  862 
 ...  863     pub fn recent_turn_summaries(&self) -> Result<Vec<String>> {
 ...  864         let state = self
 ...  865             .state
 ...  866             .lock()
 ...  867             .map_err(|_| anyhow!("Sift session state lock poisoned"))?;
 ...  868 
 ...  869         Ok(state
 ...  870             .local_context
 ...  871             .iter()
 ...  872             .rev()
 ...  873             .filter_map(|item| match item {
 ...  874                 LocalContextSource::AgentTurn(turn) => Some(format!(
 ...  875                     "{}: {}",
 ...  876                     turn.role,
 ...  877                     trim_for_context(&turn.content, 180)
 ...  878                 )),
 ...  879                 _ => None,
 ...  880             })
 ...  881             .take(6)
 ...  882             .collect::<Vec<_>>()
 ...  883             .into_iter()
 ...  884             .rev()
 ...  885             .collect())
 ...  886     }

.... 1592 fn build_planner_action_prompt(prompt: &PlannerPrompt<'_>) -> String {
.... 1593     format!(
.... 1594         "You are the recursive planner lane for Paddles.\n\
.... 1595 Choose the NEXT bounded workspace resource action for this turn.\n\
.... 1596 Reply with ONLY one JSON object and no prose or markdown.\n\
.... 1597 \n\
.... 1598 Allowed actions:\n\
.... 1599 - {{\"action\":\"search\",\"query\":\"...\",\"intent\":\"optional\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1600 - {{\"action\":\"read\",\"path\":\"relative/path\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1601 - {{\"action\":\"inspect\",\"command\":\"read-only shell command\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1602 - {{\"action\":\"refine\",\"query\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1603 - {{\"action\":\"branch\",\"branches\":[\"...\",\"...\"],\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1604 - {{\"action\":\"stop\",\"reason\":\"...\",\"rationale\":\"...\"}}\n\
.... 1605 \n\
.... 1606 Rules:\n\
.... 1607 - Search when you need workspace retrieval.\n\
.... 1608 - Read when a specific file or artifact should be opened.\n\
.... 1609 - Inspect when a read-only workspace command would clarify state.\n\
.... 1610 - Refine when an earlier search needs a sharper query.\n\
.... 1611 - Branch when the investigation should split into multiple subqueries.\n\
.... 1612 - Stop when you already have enough evidence or when the question does not require workspace resources.\n\
.... 1613 - Never answer the user directly here.\n\
.... 1614 - Inspect commands must stay read-only.\n\
.... 1615 \n\
.... 1616 Workspace root:\n\
.... 1617 {}\n\
.... 1618 \n\
.... 1619 Interpretation context:\n\
.... 1620 {}\n\
.... 1621 \n\
.... 1622 Recent turns:\n\
.... 1623 {}\n\
.... 1624 \n\
.... 1625 Current loop state:\n\
.... 1626 {}\n\
.... 1627 \n\
.... 1628 Current user request:\n\
.... 1629 {}\n",
.... 1630         prompt.workspace_root.display(),
.... 1631         format_interpretation_context_digest(prompt.interpretation),
.... 1632         format_recent_turn_list(&prompt.request.recent_turns),
.... 1633         format_planner_loop_state_digest(prompt.request),
.... 1634         prompt.user_prompt,
.... 1635     )
.... 1636 }

.... 1984 fn format_recent_turn_list(turns: &[String]) -> String {
.... 1985     if turns.is_empty() {
.... 1986         return "No recent turns were attached.".to_string();
.... 1987     }
.... 1988 
.... 1989     turns
.... 1990         .iter()
.... 1991         .map(|turn| format!("- {}", trim_for_context(turn, 240)))

.... 1995 
.... 1996 fn format_planner_loop_state_digest(request: &PlannerRequest) -> String {
.... 1997     let remaining_steps = request
.... 1998         .budget
.... 1999         .max_steps
.... 2000         .saturating_sub(request.loop_state.steps.len());
.... 2001     let mut lines = vec![format!(
.... 2002         "Budget remaining: steps={}, evidence_limit={}, pending_branches={}",
.... 2003         remaining_steps,
.... 2004         request.budget.max_evidence_items,
.... 2005         request.loop_state.pending_branches.len()
.... 2006     )];
.... 2007 
.... 2008     if request.loop_state.steps.is_empty() {
.... 2009         lines.push("No planner steps have executed yet.".to_string());
.... 2010     } else {
.... 2011         for step in request.loop_state.steps.iter().rev().take(4).rev() {
.... 2012             lines.push(format!(
.... 2013                 "- step {}: {} -> {}",
.... 2014                 step.sequence,
.... 2015                 step.action.summary(),
.... 2016                 trim_for_context(&step.outcome, 180)
.... 2017             ));
.... 2018         }
.... 2019     }
.... 2020 
.... 2021     if !request.loop_state.evidence_items.is_empty() {
.... 2022         lines.push("Current evidence:".to_string());
.... 2023         for item in request
.... 2024             .loop_state
.... 2025             .evidence_items
.... 2026             .iter()
.... 2027             .take(request.budget.max_evidence_items.min(4))
.... 2028         {
.... 2029             lines.push(format!(
.... 2030                 "- {}: {}",
.... 2031                 item.source,
.... 2032                 trim_for_context(&item.snippet, 180)
.... 2033             ));
.... 2034         }
.... 2035     }
.... 2036 
.... 2037     if !request.loop_state.notes.is_empty() {
.... 2038         lines.push("Current notes:".to_string());
.... 2039         for note in request.loop_state.notes.iter().take(3) {
.... 2040             lines.push(format!("- {}", trim_for_context(note, 180)));
.... 2041         }
.... 2042     }
.... 2043 
.... 2044     if !request.loop_state.pending_branches.is_empty() {
.... 2045         lines.push(format!(
.... 2046             "Pending branches: {}",
.... 2047             request.loop_state.pending_branches.join(" | ")
.... 2048         ));
.... 2049     }
.... 2050 
.... 2051     lines.join("\n")
.... 2052 }
